translation: Then the brahmin householders of Sālā went to the Blessed One. Having approached, some bowed to the Blessed One and sat down to one side. Some exchanged greetings with the Blessed One, and after sharing pleasant and memorable talk, sat down to one side. Some saluted the Blessed One with joined palms and sat down to one side. Some announced their name and clan in the presence of the Blessed One and sat down to one side. Some kept silent and sat down to one side. Sitting to one side, the brahmin householders of Sālā said to the Blessed One: 'What is the cause, Master Gotama, what is the reason, why some beings here, with the breakup of the body, after death, are reborn in a state of loss, a bad destination, ruin, hell?' But what is the cause, Master Gotama, what is the reason, why some beings here, with the breakup of the body, after death, are reborn in a happy destination, in a heavenly world?
literal_translation: Then indeed the Sālā-inhabiting brahmin-householders where the Blessed One was there approached, having approached, some the Blessed One having bowed to one side sat down, some with the Blessed One together exchanged greetings, polite talk memorable having finished to one side sat down, some where the Blessed One was there palms having saluted to one side sat down, some of the Blessed One in presence name-clan having announced to one side sat down, some silent-become to one side sat down. To one side sitting indeed Sālā-inhabiting brahmin-householders to the Blessed One this said, what indeed indeed, master Gotama, cause, what reason, by which here some beings of body breakup after death state of loss bad destination ruin hell are reborn? what but, Master Gotama, cause, what reason, by which here some

data.meaning_1: then; also; and so; after that
data.example_1:
sabbe saṅkhārā aniccā'ti,
yadā paññāya passati,
atha nibbindati dukkhe,
esa maggo visuddhiyā.
data.example_2: yadā kho, bhikkhave, kummo kacchapo soṇḍipañcamānaṃ aṅgānaṃ aññataraṃ vā aññataraṃ vā aṅgaṃ na abhininnāmi, atha siṅgālo kummamhā nibbijja pakkāmi, otāraṃ alabhamāno.

data.example_1:
appakā te manussesu,
ye janā pāragāmino,
atha-ayaṃ itarā pajā,
tīram'ev'ānudhāvati.
data.example_2:
atha pāpāni kammāni,
karaṃ bālo na bujjhati,
sehi kammehi dummedho,
aggidaḍḍho'va tappati.

data.example_1: evaṃ vutte aññataro bhikkhu there bhikkhū etadavoca, phasso kho, āvuso, eko anto, phassasamudayo dutiyo anto, phassanirodho majjhe, taṇhā sibbinī.
data.example_2: tatra kho bhagavā bhikkhū āmantesi, bhikkhavo'ti. bhadante'ti te bhikkhū bhagavato paccassosuṃ. bhagavā etadavoca

data.meaning_1: from the town of Sālā; living in Sālā
data.example_1: assosuṃ kho sāleyyakā brāhmaṇagahapatikā, samaṇo khalu, bho, gotamo sakyaputto sakyakulā pabbajito kosalesu cārikaṃ caramāno mahatā bhikkhusaṅghena saddhiṃ sālaṃ anuppatto.
data.example_2: evaṃ vutte, sāleyyakā brāhmaṇagahapatikā bhagavantaṃ etadavocuṃ, abhikkantaṃ, bho gotama, abhikkantaṃ, bho gotama!

data.example_2: assosuṃ kho mithileyyakā brāhmaṇagahapatikā, samaṇo khalu, bho, gotamo sakyaputto sakyakulā pabbajito videhesu cārikaṃ caramāno mahatā bhikkhusaṅghena saddhiṃ pañcamattehi bhikkhusatehi mithilaṃ anuppatto

components.meaning_1: Brahman; priest; man of the Brahman caste
components.example_1:
na jaccā vasalo hoti,
na jaccā hoti brāhmaṇo,
kammunā vasalo hoti,
kammunā hoti brāhmaṇo'ti.
components.example_2: imāni cattāri ariyasaccānī'ti, bhikkhave, mayā dhammo desito aniggahito asaṃkiliṭṭho anupavajjo appaṭikuṭṭho samaṇehi brāhmaṇehi viññūhī'ti. iti yaṃ taṃ vuttaṃ idam'etaṃ paṭicca vuttan'ti.

components.example_1:
tass'īdha diṭṭhe va sute mute vā,
pakappitā n'atthi aṇū'pi saññā,
taṃ brāhmaṇaṃ diṭṭhim'anādiyānaṃ,
ken'īdha lokasmiṃ vikappayeyya.
components.example_2: aham'asmi, bhikkhave, brāhmaṇo yācayogo sadā payatapāṇi antimadehadharo anuttaro bhisakko sallakatto.

components.example_1:
chinda sotaṃ parakkamma,
kāme panuda brāhmaṇa,
saṅkhārānaṃ khayaṃ ñatvā,
akataññū'si brāhmaṇa.
components.example_2:
divā tapati ādicco,
rattim'ābhāti candimā,
sannaddho khattiyo tapati,
jhāyī tapati brāhmaṇo,
atha sabbam'ahorattiṃ,
buddho tapati tejasā.

components.example_1:
sāleyya verañjaduve ca tuṭṭhi,
cūḷamahādhammasamādānañ'ca,
vīmaṃsakā kosambi ca brāhmaṇo,
dūsī ca māro dasamo ca vaggo.
yam'pi no saddhā gahapatikā divā vikāle paṇītaṃ khādanīyaṃ vā bhojanīyaṃ vā denti, tatra'p'ime mukh'āvaraṇaṃ maññe karontī'ti.
components.example_2: ko nu kho bho kaccāna hetu ko paccayo yena khattiyā'pi khattiyehi vivadanti brāhmaṇā'pi brāhmaṇehi vivadanti gahapatikā'pi gahapatikehi vivadantī'ti?

components.meaning_combo: grip; grabbing; seizing; holding; lit. what is grasped
components.example_1:
n'atthi rāgasamo aggi,
n'atthi dosasamo gaho,
n'atthi mohasamaṃ jālaṃ,
n'atthi taṇhāsamā nadī.
components.example_2:
idaṃ pure cittam'acāri cārikaṃ,
yen'icchakaṃ yatthakāmaṃ yathāsukhaṃ,
tadajj'ahaṃ niggahessāmi yoniso,
hatthippabhinnaṃ viya aṅkusaggaho.

components.example_1:
gahakāraka diṭṭho'si,
puna gehaṃ na kāhasi,
sabbā te phāsukā bhaggā,
gahakūṭaṃ visaṅkhataṃ,
visaṅkhāragataṃ cittaṃ,
taṇhānaṃ khayamajjhagā.
components.example_2: gahapati vā gahapatiputto vā aññatarasmiṃ vā kule paccājāto.

components.meaning_combo: household life; laylife; lit. what is grasped
components.example_1:
nam'atthi ūnaṃ kāmehi,
hiṃsitā me na vijjati,
amanussavaco sutvā,
tasm'āhaṃ na gahe rame.
components.example_2:
so'haṃ tam'ev'ānuvicintayanto,
eko sayāmi sayanassa majjhe,
aham'pi evaṃ iti pekkhamāno,
na gahe rame brahmacariyassa kālo.

components.example_1:
khippaṃ assamam'āgantvā,
madhutelaṃ gahiṃ ahaṃ,
kolambakaṃ gahetvāna,
upagacchiṃ vināyakaṃ.
bodhisattassa vacanaṃ sutvā seṭṭhi kampamāno dhanasokena satiṃ paccupaṭṭhāpetuṃ asakkonto tatth'eva pati

so puṇṇako kāmavegena giddho,
irandhatiṃ nāgakaññaṃ jigiṃsaṃ,
gantvāna taṃ bhūtapatiṃ yasassiṃ,
icc'abravī vessavaṇaṃ kuveraṃ.
components.example_2: gahapati vā gahapatiputto vā aññatarasmiṃ vā kule paccājāto.

components.example_1:
sumuttā sādhumutt'āmhi,
tīhi khujjehi muttiyā,
udukkhalena musalena,
patinā khujjakena ca,
mutt'āmhi jātimaraṇā,
bhavanetti samūhatā'ti.
components.example_2:
patīsu dhammaṃ pacarāma sabbā,
patibbatā yattha bhavanti itthiyo,
patīsu dhammaṃ pacaritva sabbā,
lacchāmase bhāsati yaṃ ayaṃ latā.

components.example_1:
tato ratyā vivasāne,
sūriyass'uggamanaṃ pati,
sabbaṃ taṇhaṃ visosetvā,
pallaṅkena upāvisin'ti.

so aham'pi gamissāmi,
nagaraṃ mithilaṃ pati,
app'eva maṃ so bhagavā,
sabbadukkhā pamocaye.
components.example_2:
eso hi bhagavā buddho,
nadiṃ nerañjaraṃ pati,
sabbadukkhappahānāya,
dhammaṃ deseti pāṇinaṃ,
tass'āhaṃ santikaṃ gacchaṃ,
so me satthā bhavissati.

components.example_1:
saṇhatuṅgasadisī ca nāsikā,
sobhate su abhiyobbanaṃ pati,
sā jarāya upakūlitā viya,
saccavādivacanaṃ anaññathā.

ekam'antaṃ nisinnaṃ kho āyasmantaṃ mahākassapaṃ bhagavā etadavoca, jiṇṇo'si dāni tvaṃ, kassapa, garukāni ca te imāni sāṇāni paṃsukūlāni nibbasanāni. tasmā't'iha tvaṃ, kassapa, gahapatikāni c'eva cīvarāni dhārehi, nimantanāni ca bhuñjāhi, mama ca santike viharāhī'ti.

n'atthi mohasamaṃ jālaṃ,

n'atthi taṇhāsamā nadī.
components.example_2:
idaṃ pure cittam'acāri cārikaṃ,
yen'icchakaṃ yatthakāmaṃ yathāsukhaṃ,
tadajj'ahaṃ niggahessāmi yoniso,
hatthippabhinnaṃ viya aṅkusaggaho.

components.example_1:
gahakāraka diṭṭho'si,
puna gehaṃ na kāhasi,
sabbā te phāsukā bhaggā,
gahakūṭaṃ visaṅkhataṃ,
visaṅkhāragataṃ cittaṃ,
taṇhānaṃ khayamajjhagā.
components.example_2: gahapati vā gahapatiputto vā aññatarasmiṃ vā kule paccājāto.

components.meaning_combo: household life; laylife; lit. what is grasped
components.example_1:
nam'atthi ūnaṃ kāmehi,
hiṃsitā me na vijjati,
amanussavaco sutvā,
tasm'āhaṃ na gahe rame.
components.example_2:
so'haṃ tam'ev'ānuvicintayanto,
eko sayāmi sayanassa majjhe,
aham'pi evaṃ iti pekkhamāno,
na gahe rame brahmacariyassa kālo.

components.example_1:
khippaṃ assamam'āgantvā,
madhutelaṃ gahiṃ ahaṃ,
kolambakaṃ gahetvāna,
upagacchiṃ vināyakaṃ.
bodhisattassa vacanaṃ sutvā seṭṭhi kampamāno dhanasokena satiṃ paccupaṭṭhāpetuṃ asakkonto tatth'eva pati

so puṇṇako kāmavegena giddho,
irandhatiṃ nāgakaññaṃ jigiṃsaṃ,
gantvāna taṃ bhūtapatiṃ yasassiṃ,
icc'abravī vessavaṇaṃ kuveraṃ.
components.example_2: gahapati vā gahapatiputto vā aññatarasmiṃ vā kule paccājāto.

components.example_1:
sumuttā sādhumutt'āmhi,
tīhi khujjehi muttiyā,
udukkhalena musalena,
patinā khujjakena ca,
mutt'āmhi jātimaraṇā,
bhavanetti samūhatā'ti.
components.example_2:
patīsu dhammaṃ pacarāma sabbā,
patibbatā yattha bhavanti itthiyo,
patīsu dhammaṃ pacaritva sabbā,
lacchāmase bhāsati yaṃ ayaṃ latā.

components.example_1:
tato ratyā vivasāne,
sūriyass'uggamanaṃ pati,
sabbaṃ taṇhaṃ visosetvā,
pallaṅkena upāvisin'ti.

so aham'pi gamissāmi,
nagaraṃ mithilaṃ pati,
app'eva maṃ so bhagavā,
sabbadukkhā pamocaye.
components.example_2:
eso hi bhagavā buddho,
nadiṃ nerañjaraṃ pati,
sabbadukkhappahānāya,
dhammaṃ deseti pāṇinaṃ,
tass'āhaṃ santikaṃ gacchaṃ,
so me satthā bhavissati.

components.example_1:
saṇhatuṅgasadisī ca nāsikā,
sobhate su abhiyobbanaṃ pati,
sā jarāya upakūlitā viya,
saccavādivacanaṃ anaññathā.

ekam'antaṃ nisinnaṃ kho āyasmantaṃ mahākassapaṃ bhagavā etadavoca, jiṇṇo'si dāni tvaṃ, kassapa, garukāni ca te imāni sāṇāni paṃsukūlāni nibbasanāni. tasmā't'iha tvaṃ, kassapa, gahapatikāni c'eva cīvarāni dhārehi, nimantanāni ca bhuñjāhi, mama ca santike viharāhī'ti.

components.meaning_combo: grip; grabbing; seizing; holding; lit. what is grasped

data.example_2:
so bajjhataṃ pāsasatehi chabbhi,

data.grammar: ind, adv, instr sg of ya
data.example_1:
na tena thero so hoti,
yena-assa palitaṃ siro,
paripakko vayo tassa,
moghajiṇṇo'ti vuccati.
data.example_2: ko nu kho bho kaccāna hetu ko paccayo yena khattiyā'pi khattiyehi vivadanti brāhmaṇā'pi brāhmaṇehi vivadanti gahapatikā'pi gahapatikehi vivadantī'ti?

data.grammar: ind, adv, instr sg of ya
data.meaning_1: where; wherever; in which direction; to; towards
data.example_1: atha kho āyasmā ānando pubb'aṇhasamayaṃ nivāsetvā pattacīvaram'ādāya yena aññataro bhikkhun'upassayo ten'upasaṅkami
data.example_2: siṅgālo'pi kho, bhikkhave, addasa kummaṃ kacchapaṃ dūrato'va gocarapasutaṃ. disvāna yena kummo kacchapo ten'upasaṅkami.

data.meaning_1: Sublime One; Blessed One; Fortunate One; Auspicious One; epithet of the Buddha
data.example_1:
anejaṃ mūladassāviṃ,
atthi pañhena āgamaṃ,
kiṃ nissitā isayo manujā,
khattiyā brāhmaṇā devatānaṃ,
yaññam'akappayiṃsu puthū'dha loke,
pucchāmi taṃ bhagavā brūhi me taṃ.
data.example_2: bhagavaṃmūlakā no, bhante, dhammā bhagavaṃnettikā bhagavaṃpaṭisaraṇā. sādhu vata, bhante, bhagavantaṃ'y'eva paṭibhātu etassa bhāsitassa attho. bhagavato sutvā bhikkhū dhāressantī'ti.

data.meaning_1: approached there; went to that place
data.example_1: siṅgālo'pi kho, bhikkhave, addasa kummaṃ kacchapaṃ dūrato'va gocarapasutaṃ. disvāna yena kummo kacchapo ten'upasaṅkami.
data.example_2: so kho ahaṃ, aggivessana, kiṃkusalagavesī anuttaraṃ santivarapadaṃ pariyesamāno yena udako rāmaputto ten'upasaṅkamiṃ, upasaṅkamitvā udakaṃ rāmaputtaṃ etadavocaṃ

components.example_1: ekam'antaṃ nisinnā kho tā bhikkhuniyo āyasmantaṃ ānandaṃ etadavocuṃ
components.example_2: idha cunda ekacco anabhijjhālu hoti. yaṃ taṃ parassa paravitt'ūpakaraṇaṃ taṃ anabhijjhitā hoti, aho vata yaṃ parassa taṃ mamassā'ti

components.example_1: ekam'antaṃ nisinnā kho tā bhikkhuniyo āyasmantaṃ ānandaṃ etadavocuṃ
components.example_2: idha cunda ekacco anabhijjhālu hoti. yaṃ taṃ parassa paravitt'ūpakaraṇaṃ taṃ anabhijjhitā hoti, aho vata yaṃ parassa taṃ mamassā'ti

components.grammar: ind, adv, instr sg of ta
components.meaning_1: thereby; because of that; on that account
components.meaning_combo: thereby; because of that; on that account; lit. by that; with that
components.example_1: tena, bhikkhave, bhikkhunā tesaṃ'y'eva pāpakānaṃ akusalānaṃ dhammānaṃ pahānāya adhimatto chando ca vāyāmo ca ussāho ca ussoḷhī ca appaṭivānī ca sati ca sampajaññañ'ca karaṇīyaṃ.
components.example_2:
yo bālo maññati bālyaṃ,
paṇḍito vā'pi tena so,
bālo ca paṇḍitamānī,
sa ve bālo'ti vuccati.

components.grammar: ind, adv, instr sg of ta
components.example_1:
yena yena subhikkhāni,
sivāni abhayāni ca,
tena puttaka gacchassu,
mā sokāpahato bhavā'ti.
components.example_2: atha kho ambaṭṭho māṇavo yena so vihāro saṃvutadvāro, tena appasaddo upasaṅkamitvā ataramāno āḷindaṃ pavisitvā ukkāsitvā aggaḷaṃ ākoṭesi. vivari bhagavā dvāraṃ.

components.example_1: atha kho āyasmā ānando pubb'aṇhasamayaṃ nivāsetvā pattacīvaram'ādāya yena aññataro bhikkhun'upassayo ten'upasaṅkami
components.example_2: kosambiyaṃ piṇḍāya caritvā pacchābhattaṃ piṇḍapātapaṭikkantā yena bhagavā ten'upasaṅkamiṃsu, upasaṅkamitvā bhagavantaṃ abhivādetvā ekam'antaṃ nisīdiṃsu.

components.meaning_combo: approached; drew near; went (to); lit. went near
components.example_1: atha kho āyasmā ānando pubb'aṇhasamayaṃ nivāsetvā pattacīvaram'ādāya yena aññataro bhikkhun'upassayo ten'upasaṅkami
components.example_2: kosambiyaṃ piṇḍāya caritvā pacchābhattaṃ piṇḍapātapaṭikkantā yena bhagavā ten'upasaṅkamiṃsu, upasaṅkamitvā bhagavantaṃ abhivādetvā ekam'antaṃ nisīdiṃsu.

data.meaning_1: having approached; having gone; having drawn near (to)
data.example_1: ty'āhaṃ upasaṅkamitvā evaṃ vadāmi, saccaṃ kira tumhe āyasmanto evaṃvādino evaṃdiṭṭhino, ek'antasukhī attā hoti arogo paraṃ maraṇā'ti?
data.example_2: upasaṅkamitvā kummaṃ kacchapaṃ paccupaṭṭhito ahosi, yadā'yaṃ kummo kacchapo soṇḍipañcamānaṃ aṅgānaṃ aññataraṃ vā aññataraṃ vā aṅgaṃ abhininnāmessati, tatth'eva naṃ gahetvā uddālitvā khādissāmī'ti.

data.meaning_1: (singular) a certain; (plural) some; a few; several
data.example_1: app'ekacce bhagavatā saddhiṃ sammodiṃsu, sammodanīyaṃ kathaṃ sāraṇīyaṃ vītisāretvā ekam'antaṃ nisīdiṃsu, app'ekacce yena bhagavā ten'añjaliṃ paṇāmetvā ekam'antaṃ nisīdiṃsu, app'ekacce nāmagottaṃ sāvetvā ekam'antaṃ nisīdiṃsu
data.example_2:
dukkho itthibhāvo,
akkhāto purisadammasārathinā,
sapattikam'pi hi dukkhaṃ,
app'ekaccā sakiṃ vijātāyo.

components.example_1:
bahussuto ca medhāvī,
sīlesu susamāhito,
cetosamatham'anuyutto,
api muddhani tiṭṭhatu.

api dibbesu kāmesu,
ratiṃ so n'ādhigacchati,
taṇhakkhayarato hoti,
sammāsambuddhasāvako.
components.example_2:
disvāna taṇhaṃ aratiṃ ragañ'ca,
n'āhosi chando api methunasmiṃ,
kim'ev'idaṃ muttakarīsapuṇṇaṃ,
pādā'pi naṃ samphusituṃ na icche.

components.example_1: sacc'āhaṃ, ācariya, paṭissuṇiṃ, api-ahaṃ marissāmi, n'āhaṃ sakkomi ekena passena sattamāse nipajjitun'ti
components.example_2:
yathā'pi mūle anupaddave daḷhe,
chinno'pi rukkho punareva rūhati, 
evam'pi taṇh'ānusaye anūhate,
nibbattatī dukkham'idaṃ punappunaṃ.

components.example_1: api, samaṇa, balībadde addasā'ti?
components.example_2: addasā kho aññataro upāsako taṃ bhikkhuṃ kīṭāgirismiṃ piṇḍāya carantaṃ. disvāna yena so bhikkhu ten'upasaṅkami, upasaṅkamitvā taṃ bhikkhuṃ abhivādetvā etadavoca, api, bhante, piṇḍo labbhatī'ti?

components.example_1: api ca, udāyi, ānando diṭṭh'eva dhamme parinibbāyissatī'ti
yam'pi taṃ diṭṭhaṃ sutaṃ mutaṃ viññātaṃ pattaṃ pariyesitaṃ, anuvicaritaṃ manasā tam'pi etaṃ mama, eso'ham'asmi, eso me attā'ti samanupassati
so tena ñattena attān'ukkaṃseti, paraṃ vambheti. ayam'pi, bhikkhave, asappurisadhammo.
components.example_2: jāti'pi dukkhā, jarā'pi dukkhā, maraṇam'pi dukkhaṃ, soka-parideva-dukkha-domanass'upāyāsā'pi dukkhā

components.example_1: evam'evaṃ kho, bhikkhave, idh'ekacco bhikkhu bhikkhusaṅghaṃ piṭṭhito piṭṭhito anubandho hoti, aham'pi bhikkhu, aham'pi bhikkhū'ti.
components.example_2: idha, bhikkhave, ekaccassa puggalassa appamattakam'pi pāpakammaṃ kataṃ tam'enaṃ nirayaṃ upaneti.

components.example_1: katamā ca, sāriputta, opapātikā yoni? devā, nerayikā, ekacce ca manussā, ekacce ca vinipātikā, ayaṃ vuccati, sāriputta, opapātikā yoni.
components.example_2: ye'me, bho gotama, samaṇabrāhmaṇā saṅghino gaṇino gaṇ'ācariyā ñātā yasassino titthakarā sādhusammatā, bahujanassa… sabb'ete sakāya paṭiññāya abbhaññaṃsu sabb'eva n'ābbhaññaṃsu, udāhu ekacce abbhaññaṃsu ekacce n'ābbhaññaṃsū'ti?

components.example_1: puna caparaṃ, bhikkhave, sappuriso sabbaso n'evasaññān'āsaññ'āyatanaṃ samatikkamma saññāvedayitanirodhaṃ upasampajja viharati. paññāya c'assa disvā ekacce āsavā parikkhīṇā honti.

components.example_2: ye'me, bho gotama, samaṇabrāhmaṇā saṅghino gaṇino gaṇ'ācariyā ñātā yasassino titthakarā sādhusammatā, bahujanassa… sabb'ete sakāya paṭiññāya abbhaññaṃsu sabb'eva n'ābbhaññaṃsu, udāhu ekacce abbhaññaṃsu ekacce n'ābbhaññaṃsū'ti?

components.example_1: puna caparaṃ, bhikkhave, sappuriso sabbaso n'evasaññān'āsaññ'āyatanaṃ samatikkamma saññāvedayitanirodhaṃ upasampajja viharati. paññāya c'assa disvā ekacce āsavā parikkhīṇā honti.

data.meaning_1: (singular) a certain; (plural) some; a few; several
data.meaning_combo: (singular) a certain; (plural) some; a few; several
data.example_1: app'ekacce bhagavatā saddhiṃ sammodiṃsu, sammodanīyaṃ kathaṃ sāraṇīyaṃ vītisāretvā ekam'antaṃ nisīdiṃsu, app'ekacce yena bhagavā ten'añjaliṃ paṇāmetvā ekam'antaṃ nisīdiṃsu, app'ekacce nāmagottaṃ sāvetvā ekam'antaṃ nisīdiṃsu
data.example_2:
dukkho itthibhāvo,
akkhāto purisadammasārathinā,
sapattikam'pi hi dukkhaṃ,
app'ekaccā sakiṃ vijātāyo.

components.example_1:
bahussuto ca medhāvī,
sīlesu susamāhito,
cetosamatham'anuyutto,
api muddhani tiṭṭhatu.

api dibbesu kāmesu,
ratiṃ so n'ādhigacchati,
taṇhakkhayarato hoti,
sammāsambuddhasāvako.
components.example_2:
disvāna taṇhaṃ aratiṃ ragañ'ca,
n'āhosi chando api methunasmiṃ,
kim'ev'idaṃ muttakarīsapuṇṇaṃ,
pādā'pi naṃ samphusituṃ na icche.

components.example_1: sacc'āhaṃ, ācariya, paṭissuṇiṃ, api-ahaṃ marissāmi, n'āhaṃ sakkomi ekena passena sattamāse nipajjitun'ti
components.example_2:
yathā'pi mūle anupaddave daḷhe,
chinno'pi rukkho punareva rūhati, 
evam'pi taṇh'ānusaye anūhate,
nibbattatī dukkham'idaṃ punappunaṃ.

components.example_1: api, samaṇa, balībadde addasā'ti?
components.example_2: addasā kho aññataro upāsako taṃ bhikkhuṃ kīṭāgirismiṃ piṇḍāya carantaṃ. disvāna yena so bhikkhu ten'upasaṅkami, upasaṅkamitvā taṃ bhikkhuṃ abhivādetvā etadavoca, api, bhante, piṇḍo labbhatī'ti?

components.example_1: api ca, udāyi, ānando diṭṭh'eva dhamme parinibbāyissatī'ti
yam'pi taṃ diṭṭhaṃ sutaṃ mutaṃ viññātaṃ pattaṃ pariyesitaṃ, anuvicaritaṃ manasā tam'pi etaṃ mama, eso'ham'asmi, eso me attā'ti samanupassati
so tena ñattena attān'ukkaṃseti, paraṃ vambheti. ayam'pi, bhikkhave, asappurisadhammo.
components.example_2: jāti'pi dukkhā, jarā'pi dukkhā, maraṇam'pi dukkhaṃ, soka-parideva-dukkha-domanass'upāyāsā'pi dukkhā

components.example_1: evam'evaṃ kho, bhikkhave, idh'ekacco bhikkhu bhikkhusaṅghaṃ piṭṭhito piṭṭhito anubandho hoti, aham'pi bhikkhu, aham'pi bhikkhū'ti.
components.example_2: idha, bhikkhave, ekaccassa puggalassa appamattakam'pi pāpakammaṃ kataṃ tam'enaṃ nirayaṃ upaneti.

components.example_1: katamā ca, sāriputta, opapātikā yoni? devā, nerayikā, ekacce ca manussā, ekacce ca vinipātikā, ayaṃ vuccati, sāriputta, opapātikā yoni.

data.meaning_1: Sublime One; Blessed One; Fortunate One; Auspicious One; epithet of the Buddha
data.example_1:
anejaṃ mūladassāviṃ,
atthi pañhena āgamaṃ,
kiṃ nissitā isayo manujā,
khattiyā brāhmaṇā devatānaṃ,
yaññam'akappayiṃsu puthū'dha loke,
pucchāmi taṃ bhagavā brūhi me taṃ.
data.example_2: bhagavaṃmūlakā no, bhante, dhammā bhagavaṃnettikā bhagavaṃpaṭisaraṇā. sādhu vata, bhante, bhagavantaṃ'y'eva paṭibhātu etassa bhāsitassa attho. bhagavato sutvā bhikkhū dhāressantī'ti.

data.meaning_1: having bowed down; having paid high respect (to)
data.example_1: atha kho ambapālī gaṇikā bhagavato adhivāsanaṃ viditvā uṭṭhāy'āsanā bhagavantaṃ abhivādetvā padakkhiṇaṃ katvā pakkāmi.
data.example_2: atha kho therā bhikkhū yena bhagavā ten'upasaṅkamiṃsu. upasaṅkamitvā bhagavantaṃ abhivādetvā ekam'antaṃ nisīdiṃsu.

data.grammar: ind, adv, comp, acc sg of ekamanta
data.example_1: atha kho bhagavā kumbhakār'āvesanaṃ pavisitvā ekam'antaṃ tiṇasanthārakaṃ paññāpetvā nisīdi pallaṅkaṃ ābhujitvā ujuṃ kāyaṃ paṇidhāya parimukhaṃ satiṃ upaṭṭhapetvā.
data.example_2: tena kho pana samayena kasibhāradvājassa brāhmaṇassa parivesanā vattati. atha kho bhagavā yena parivesanā ten'upasaṅkami, upasaṅkamitvā ekam'antaṃ aṭṭhāsi.

components.example_1: seyyathā'pi, bhikkhave, mahāsamuddo ekaraso loṇaraso, evam'eva kho, bhikkhave, ayaṃ dhammavinayo ekaraso vimuttiraso
components.example_2:
yo ca gāthā sataṃ bhāse,
anatthapadasaṃhitā,
ekaṃ dhammapadaṃ seyyo,
yaṃ sutvā upasammati.

components.example_1:
yo ca vassasataṃ jantu,
aggiṃ paricare vane,
ekañ'ca bhāvit'attānaṃ,
muhuttam'api pūjaye,
sā'y'eva pūjanā seyyo,
yañ'ce vassasataṃ hutaṃ.
components.example_2: atīte kira kassapasammāsambuddhakāle gāmavāsī eko kuṭumbiko ekassa therassa vihāraṃ katvā taṃ tattha viharantaṃ catūhi paccayehi upaṭṭhahi

components.example_1:
supupphit'aggaṃ upagamma bhikkhuni,
ekā tuvaṃ tiṭṭhasi sālamūle,
na c'atthi te dutiyā vaṇṇadhātu,
bāle na tvaṃ bhāyasi dhuttakānan'ti.
components.example_2: so eko gāmaṃ piṇḍāya pavisati eko paṭikkamati eko raho nisīdati eko caṅkamaṃ adhiṭṭhāti.

components.example_1: tesam'assa ekaputtako piyo manāpo
components.example_2:
mātā yathā niyaṃ puttaṃ āyusā ekaputtam'anurakkhe, 
evam'pi sabbabhūtesu,
mānasam'bhāvaye aparimāṇaṃ.

components.example_1: yo pana bhikkhu bhikkhuniyā saddhiṃ saṃvidhāya ek'addhānamaggaṃ paṭipajjeyya antamaso gām'antaram'pi aññatra samayā, pācittiyaṃ. tatth'āyaṃ samayo, satthagamanīyo hoti maggo, sāsaṅkasammato, sappaṭibhayo, ayaṃ tattha samayo.
components.example_2: yo pana bhikkhu bhikkhuniyā saddhiṃ saṃvidhāya ekaṃ nāvaṃ abhiruheyya uddhaṃgāminiṃ vā adhogāminiṃ vā aññatra tiriyaṃ taraṇāya, pācittiyaṃ.

components.meaning_1: one thing; single thing; a certain thing
components.meaning_combo: one thing; single thing; a certain thing
components.example_1: ye āsavā saṃkilesikā ponobbhavikā sadarā dukkhavipākā āyatiṃ jātijarāmaraṇiyā, appahīnā te tathāgatassa, tasmā tathāgato saṅkhāy'ekaṃ paṭisevati, saṅkhāy'ekaṃ adhivāseti, saṅkhāy'ekaṃ parivajjeti, saṅkhāy'ekaṃ vinodetī'ti?
yattha nu kho, bhante, na jāyati na jīyati na mīyati na cavati na upapajjati, sakkā nu kho so, bhante, gamanena lokassa anto ñātuṃ vā daṭṭhuṃ vā pāpuṇituṃ vā'ti?
components.example_2:
es'ūpamā dāmali brāhmaṇassa,
khīṇ'āsavassa nipakassa jhāyino,
pappuyya jātimaraṇassa antaṃ,
n'āyūhatī pāragato hi so'ti.

components.example_1:
ubhosu antesu vineyya chandaṃ,
phassaṃ pariññāya anānugiddho,
yadattagarahī tadakubbamāno,
na lippatī diṭṭhasutesu dhīro.
components.example_2: evaṃ vutte aññataro bhikkhu there bhikkhū etadavoca, phasso kho, āvuso, eko anto, phassasamudayo dutiyo anto, phassanirodho majjhe, taṇhā sibbinī.

components.meaning_1: ending up as; finishing in; resulting in
components.meaning_combo: ending up as; finishing in; resulting in
components.example_1: kāpotakāni aṭṭhīni bhavanti. bhass'antā āhutiyo, dattupaññattaṃ yadidaṃ dānaṃ. tesaṃ tucchā musā vilāpo ye keci atthikavādaṃ vadanti.
atthi imasmiṃ kāye… antaṃ antaguṇaṃ udariyaṃ karīsaṃ (matthaluṅgaṃ), pittaṃ semhaṃ pubbo lohitaṃ sedo medo, assu vasā kheḷo siṅghāṇikā lasikā muttan'ti.
components.example_2: atha kho so, bhikkhave, mudumūsi gocarāya pakkāmi. tam'enaṃ biḷāro gahetvā sahasā saṅkhāditvā ajjhohari. tassa so mudumūsi antam'pi khādi, antaguṇam'pi khādi.

components.example_1: sañcetanikā sukkavissaṭṭhi aññatra supin'antā saṅgh'ādiseso.
components.example_2: evaṃ, bhante. sace so, bhikkhave, dārukkhandho na orimaṃ tīraṃ upagacchati, na pārimaṃ tīraṃ upagacchati, na majjhe saṃsīdissati, na thale ussīdissati, na manussaggāho gahessati, na amanussaggāho gahessati, na āvaṭṭaggāho gahessati, na antopūti bhavissati, evañ'hi so, bhikkhave, dārukkhandho samuddaninno bhavissati samuddapoṇo samuddapabbhāro. taṃ kissa hetu?

components.meaning_combo: the worst; the lowest (of); lit. end
components.example_1: antam'idaṃ, bhikkhave, jīvikānaṃ yadidaṃ piṇḍolyaṃ. abhisāpo'yaṃ, bhikkhave, lokasmiṃ, piṇḍolo vicarasi pattapāṇī'ti.

data.example_1: upasaṅkamitvā paññatte āsane nisīdi
data.example_2: atha kho therā bhikkhū yena bhagavā ten'upasaṅkamiṃsu. upasaṅkamitvā bhagavantaṃ abhivādetvā ekam'antaṃ nisīdiṃsu.

data.meaning_combo: sank emotionally; became disheartened; lit. sank down
data.example_1: yatra hi nāmā'ti yāya jātiyā sati jarā paññāyati, sā jāti dhi'r'atthu dhikkatā atthu, jigucchām'etaṃ jātin'ti, jātiyā mūlaṃ khaṇanto nisīdi, paṭhamena sallena hadaye viddho viya.

data.meaning_1: (singular) a certain; (plural) some; a few; several
data.example_1: app'ekacce bhagavatā saddhiṃ sammodiṃsu, sammodanīyaṃ kathaṃ sāraṇīyaṃ vītisāretvā ekam'antaṃ nisīdiṃsu, app'ekacce yena bhagavā ten'añjaliṃ paṇāmetvā ekam'antaṃ nisīdiṃsu, app'ekacce nāmagottaṃ sāvetvā ekam'antaṃ nisīdiṃsu
data.example_2:
dukkho itthibhāvo,
akkhāto purisadammasārathinā,
sapattikam'pi hi dukkhaṃ,
app'ekaccā sakiṃ vijātāyo.

components.example_1:
bahussuto ca medhāvī,
sīlesu susamāhito,
cetosamatham'anuyutto,
api muddhani tiṭṭhatu.

api dibbesu kāmesu,
ratiṃ so n'ādhigacchati,
taṇhakkhayarato hoti,
sammāsambuddhasāvako.
components.example_2:
disvāna taṇhaṃ aratiṃ ragañ'ca,
n'āhosi chando api methunasmiṃ,
kim'ev'idaṃ muttakarīsapuṇṇaṃ,
pādā'pi naṃ samphusituṃ na icche.

components.example_1: sacc'āhaṃ, ācariya, paṭissuṇiṃ, api-ahaṃ marissāmi, n'āhaṃ sakkomi ekena passena sattamāse nipajjitun'ti
components.example_2:
yathā'pi mūle anupaddave daḷhe,
chinno'pi rukkho punareva rūhati, 
evam'pi taṇh'ānusaye anūhate,
nibbattatī dukkham'idaṃ punappunaṃ.

components.example_1: api, samaṇa, balībadde addasā'ti?
components.example_2: addasā kho aññataro upāsako taṃ bhikkhuṃ kīṭāgirismiṃ piṇḍāya carantaṃ. disvāna yena so bhikkhu ten'upasaṅkami, upasaṅkamitvā taṃ bhikkhuṃ abhivādetvā etadavoca, api, bhante, piṇḍo labbhatī'ti?

components.example_1: api ca, udāyi, ānando diṭṭh'eva dhamme parinibbāyissatī'ti
yam'pi taṃ diṭṭhaṃ sutaṃ mutaṃ viññātaṃ pattaṃ pariyesitaṃ, anuvicaritaṃ manasā tam'pi etaṃ mama, eso'ham'asmi, eso me attā'ti samanupassati
so tena ñattena attān'ukkaṃseti, paraṃ vambheti. ayam'pi, bhikkhave, asappurisadhammo.
components.example_2: jāti'pi dukkhā, jarā'pi dukkhā, maraṇam'pi dukkhaṃ, soka-parideva-dukkha-domanass'upāyāsā'pi dukkhā

components.example_1: evam'evaṃ kho, bhikkhave, idh'ekacco bhikkhu bhikkhusaṅghaṃ piṭṭhito piṭṭhito anubandho hoti, aham'pi bhikkhu, aham'pi bhikkhū'ti.
components.example_2: idha, bhikkhave, ekaccassa puggalassa appamattakam'pi pāpakammaṃ kataṃ tam'enaṃ nirayaṃ upaneti.

components.example_1: katamā ca, sāriputta, opapātikā yoni? devā, nerayikā, ekacce ca manussā, ekacce ca vinipātikā, ayaṃ vuccati, sāriputta, opapātikā yoni.
components.example_2: ye'me, bho gotama, samaṇabrāhmaṇā saṅghino gaṇino gaṇ'ācariyā ñātā yasassino titthakarā sādhusammatā, bahujanassa… sabb'ete sakāya paṭiññāya abbhaññaṃsu sabb'eva n'ābbhaññaṃsu, udāhu ekacce abbhaññaṃsu ekacce n'ābbhaññaṃsū'ti?

components.example_1: puna caparaṃ, bhikkhave, sappuriso sabbaso n'evasaññān'āsaññ'āyatanaṃ samatikkamma saññāvedayitanirodhaṃ upasampajja viharati. paññāya c'assa disvā ekacce āsavā parikkhīṇā honti.

data.meaning_1: Sublime One; Blessed One; Fortunate One; Auspicious One; epithet of the Buddha
data.example_1:
anejaṃ mūladassāviṃ,
atthi pañhena āgamaṃ,
kiṃ nissitā isayo manujā,
khattiyā brāhmaṇā devatānaṃ,
yaññam'akappayiṃsu puthū'dha loke,
pucchāmi taṃ bhagavā brūhi me taṃ.
data.example_2: bhagavaṃmūlakā no, bhante, dhammā bhagavaṃnettikā bhagavaṃpaṭisaraṇā. sādhu vata, bhante, bhagavantaṃ'y'eva paṭibhātu etassa bhāsitassa attho. bhagavato sutvā bhikkhū dhāressantī'ti.

data.meaning_1: Sublime One; Blessed One; Fortunate One; Auspicious One; epithet of the Buddha
data.meaning_combo: Sublime One; Blessed One; Fortunate One; Auspicious One; epithet of the Buddha; lit. having good fortune quality
data.example_1:
anejaṃ mūladassāviṃ,
atthi pañhena āgamaṃ,
kiṃ nissitā isayo manujā,
khattiyā brāhmaṇā devatānaṃ,
yaññam'akappayiṃsu puthū'dha loke,
pucchāmi taṃ bhagavā brūhi me taṃ.
data.example_2: bhagavaṃmūlakā no, bhante, dhammā bhagavaṃnettikā bhagavaṃpaṭisaraṇā. sādhu vata, bhante, bhagavantaṃ'y'eva paṭibhātu etassa bhāsitassa attho. bhagavato sutvā bhikkhū dhāressantī'ti.

data.example_1: ekam'antaṃ nisinnā kho therā bhikkhū yāvatako ahosi sabbeh'eva saddhiṃ kathāsallāpo, taṃ sabbaṃ bhagavato ārocesuṃ.
data.example_2: atha kho te bhikkhū yena aññatitthiyānaṃ paribbājakānaṃ ārāmo ten'upasaṅkamiṃsu, upasaṅkamitvā tehi aññatitthiyehi paribbājakehi saddhiṃ sammodiṃsu

data.meaning_1: greeted; exchanged pleasantries; had a friendly conversation (with)
data.example_1: atha kho verañjo brāhmaṇo yena bhagavā ten'upasaṅkami upasaṅkamitvā bhagavatā saddhiṃ sammodi
data.example_2: atha kho te bhikkhū yena aññatitthiyānaṃ paribbājakānaṃ ārāmo ten'upasaṅkamiṃsu, upasaṅkamitvā tehi aññatitthiyehi paribbājakehi saddhiṃ sammodiṃsu.

data.meaning_combo: (of conversation) pleasant; friendly; lit. to be enjoyed
data.example_1: sammodanīyaṃ kathaṃ sāraṇīyaṃ vītisāretvā daṇḍam'olubbha ekam'antaṃ aṭṭhāsi
data.example_2: sammodanīyaṃ kathaṃ sāraṇīyaṃ vītisāretvā ekam'antaṃ nisīdiṃsu. ekam'antaṃ nisinne kho te bhikkhū aññatitthiyā paribbājakā etadavocuṃ

data.meaning_combo: (of conversation) pleasant; friendly; lit. to be enjoyed
data.example_1: sammodanīyaṃ kathaṃ sāraṇīyaṃ vītisāretvā daṇḍam'olubbha ekam'antaṃ aṭṭhāsi
data.example_2: sammodanīyaṃ kathaṃ sāraṇīyaṃ vītisāretvā ekam'antaṃ nisīdiṃsu. ekam'antaṃ nisinne kho te bhikkhū aññatitthiyā paribbājakā etadavocuṃ

data.example_1: sammodanīyaṃ kathaṃ sāraṇīyaṃ vītisāretvā daṇḍam'olubbha ekam'antaṃ aṭṭhāsi
data.example_2: sammodanīyaṃ kathaṃ sāraṇīyaṃ vītisāretvā ekam'antaṃ nisīdiṃsu. ekam'antaṃ nisinne kho te bhikkhū aññatitthiyā paribbājakā etadavocuṃ

data.example_1: atthi pana bhoto gotamassa ek'upāsako'pi sāvako gihī odātavasano kāmabhogī sāsanakaro ovādappaṭikaro yo tiṇṇavicikiccho vigatakathaṃkatho vesārajjappatto aparappaccayo satthusāsane viharatī'ti?
data.example_2:
na munī gāmam'āgamma,
kulesu sahasā care,
ghās'esanaṃ chinnakatho,
na vācaṃ payutaṃ bhaṇe.

data.example_1: atthi pana bhoto gotamassa ek'upāsako'pi sāvako gihī odātavasano kāmabhogī sāsanakaro ovādappaṭikaro yo tiṇṇavicikiccho vigatakathaṃkatho vesārajjappatto aparappaccayo satthusāsane viharatī'ti?
data.example_2:

data.example_1: atthi pana bhoto gotamassa ek'upāsako'pi sāvako gihī odātavasano kāmabhogī sāsanakaro ovādappaṭikaro yo tiṇṇavicikiccho vigatakathaṃkatho vesārajjappatto aparappaccayo satthusāsane viharatī'ti?

na munī gāmam'āgamma,
kulesu sahasā care,
ghās'esanaṃ chinnakatho,
na vācaṃ payutaṃ bhaṇe.

data.example_1: kathañ'ca, bhikkhave, bhikkhu attadīpo viharati?
data.example_2:
yaṃ taṃ apucchimha akittayī no,
aññaṃ taṃ pucchāma tadiṅgha brūhi,
kathaṃ nu dhīrā vitaranti oghaṃ,
jātiṃ jaraṃ sokapariddavañ'ca,
taṃ me muni sādhu viyākarohi,
tathā hi te vidito esa dhammo.

data.example_1: kathañ'ca, bhikkhave, bhikkhu na titthaṃ jānāti? idha, bhikkhave, bhikkhu ye te bhikkhū bahussutā āgat'āgamā dhammadharā vinayadharā mātikādharā, te kālena kālaṃ upasaṅkamitvā na paripucchati, na paripañhati, idaṃ, bhante, kathaṃ? imassa ko attho'ti?
kiṃ nu kho ahosiṃ atītam'addhānaṃ? kathaṃ nu kho ahosiṃ atītam'addhānaṃ? kiṃ hutvā kiṃ ahosiṃ nu kho ahaṃ atītam'addhānaṃ?
yathā kathaṃ pana tumhe, anuruddhā, samaggā sammodamānā avivadamānā khīr'odakībhūtā aññam'aññaṃ piyacakkhūhi sampassantā viharathā'ti?

ākiñcaññaṃ pekkhamāno satimā,
n'atthī'ti nissāya tarassu oghaṃ,
kāme pahāya virato kathāhi,
taṇhakkhayaṃ nattam'ah'ābhipassa.
data.example_2:
na ca katthitā siyā bhikkhu,
na ca vācaṃ payuttaṃ bhāseyya,
pāgabbhiyaṃ na sikkheyya,
kathaṃ viggāhikaṃ na kathayeyya.

data.example_1:
yutto kathāyaṃ parisāya majjhe,
pasaṃsam'icchaṃ vinighāti hoti,
apāhatasmiṃ pana maṅku hoti,
nindāya so kuppati randhamesī.
data.example_2:
okaṃ pahāya aniketasārī,
gāme akubbaṃ muni santhavāni, 
kāmehi ritto apurekkharāno,
kathaṃ na viggayha janena kayirā.

data.meaning_1: discourse on; lecture on; sermon on

data.example_1: tena kho pana samayena bhagavā bhikkhūnaṃ anekapariyāyena asubhakathaṃ katheti, asubhāya vaṇṇaṃ bhāsati, asubhabhāvanāya vaṇṇaṃ bhāsati.

data.meaning_combo: commentary; detailed discussion; analysis; lit. talk on

data.example_1: tīṇ'imāni, bhikkhave, rañño khattiyassa muddh'āvasittassa yāvajīvaṃ sāraṇīyāni bhavanti. katamāni tīṇi?
sammodanīyaṃ kathaṃ sāraṇīyaṃ vītisāretvā daṇḍam'olubbha ekam'antaṃ aṭṭhāsi
data.example_2: sammodanīyaṃ kathaṃ sāraṇīyaṃ vītisāretvā ekam'antaṃ nisīdiṃsu. ekam'antaṃ nisinne kho te bhikkhū aññatitthiyā paribbājakā etadavocuṃ

data.grammar: ind, adv, comp, acc sg of ekamanta
data.example_1: atha kho bhagavā kumbhakār'āvesanaṃ pavisitvā ekam'antaṃ tiṇasanthārakaṃ paññāpetvā nisīdi pallaṅkaṃ ābhujitvā ujuṃ kāyaṃ paṇidhāya parimukhaṃ satiṃ upaṭṭhapetvā.
data.example_2: tena kho pana samayena kasibhāradvājassa brāhmaṇassa parivesanā vattati. atha kho bhagavā yena parivesanā ten'upasaṅkami, upasaṅkamitvā ekam'antaṃ aṭṭhāsi.

components.example_1: seyyathā'pi, bhikkhave, mahāsamuddo ekaraso loṇaraso, evam'eva kho, bhikkhave, ayaṃ dhammavinayo ekaraso vimuttiraso
components.example_2:
yo ca gāthā sataṃ bhāse,
anatthapadasaṃhitā,
ekaṃ dhammapadaṃ seyyo,
yaṃ sutvā upasammati.

components.example_1:
yo ca vassasataṃ jantu,
aggiṃ paricare vane,
ekañ'ca bhāvit'attānaṃ,
muhuttam'api pūjaye,
sā'y'eva pūjanā seyyo,
yañ'ce vassasataṃ hutaṃ.
components.example_2: atīte kira kassapasammāsambuddhakāle gāmavāsī eko kuṭumbiko ekassa therassa vihāraṃ katvā taṃ tattha viharantaṃ catūhi paccayehi upaṭṭhahi

components.example_1:
supupphit'aggaṃ upagamma bhikkhuni,
ekā tuvaṃ tiṭṭhasi sālamūle,
na c'atthi te dutiyā vaṇṇadhātu,
bāle na tvaṃ bhāyasi dhuttakānan'ti.
components.example_2: so eko gāmaṃ piṇḍāya pavisati eko paṭikkamati eko raho nisīdati eko caṅkamaṃ adhiṭṭhāti.

components.example_1: tesam'assa ekaputtako piyo manāpo
components.example_2:
mātā yathā niyaṃ puttaṃ āyusā ekaputtam'anurakkhe, 
evam'pi sabbabhūtesu,
mānasam'bhāvaye aparimāṇaṃ.

components.example_1: yo pana bhikkhu bhikkhuniyā saddhiṃ saṃvidhāya ek'addhānamaggaṃ paṭipajjeyya antamaso gām'antaram'pi aññatra samayā, pācittiyaṃ. tatth'āyaṃ samayo, satthagamanīyo hoti maggo, sāsaṅkasammato, sappaṭibhayo, ayaṃ tattha samayo.
components.example_2: yo pana bhikkhu bhikkhuniyā saddhiṃ saṃvidhāya ekaṃ nāvaṃ abhiruheyya uddhaṃgāminiṃ vā adhogāminiṃ vā aññatra tiriyaṃ taraṇāya, pācittiyaṃ.

components.meaning_1: one thing; single thing; a certain thing
components.meaning_combo: one thing; single thing; a certain thing
components.example_1: ye āsavā saṃkilesikā ponobbhavikā sadarā dukkhavipākā āyatiṃ jātijarāmaraṇiyā, appahīnā te tathāgatassa, tasmā tathāgato saṅkhāy'ekaṃ paṭisevati, saṅkhāy'ekaṃ adhivāseti, saṅkhāy'ekaṃ parivajjeti, saṅkhāy'ekaṃ vinodetī'ti?
yattha nu kho, bhante, na jāyati na jīyati na mīyati na cavati na upapajjati, sakkā nu kho so, bhante, gamanena lokassa anto ñātuṃ vā daṭṭhuṃ vā pāpuṇituṃ vā'ti?
components.example_2:
es'ūpamā dāmali brāhmaṇassa,
khīṇ'āsavassa nipakassa jhāyino,
pappuyya jātimaraṇassa antaṃ,
n'āyūhatī pāragato hi so'ti.

components.example_1:
ubhosu antesu vineyya chandaṃ,
phassaṃ pariññāya anānugiddho,
yadattagarahī tadakubbamāno,
na lippatī diṭṭhasutesu dhīro.
components.example_2: evaṃ vutte aññataro bhikkhu there bhikkhū etadavoca, phasso kho, āvuso, eko anto, phassasamudayo dutiyo anto, phassanirodho majjhe, taṇhā sibbinī.

components.meaning_1: ending up as; finishing in; resulting in
components.meaning_combo: ending up as; finishing in; resulting in
components.example_1: kāpotakāni aṭṭhīni bhavanti. bhass'antā āhutiyo, dattupaññattaṃ yadidaṃ dānaṃ. tesaṃ tucchā musā vilāpo ye keci atthikavādaṃ vadanti.
atthi imasmiṃ kāye… antaṃ antaguṇaṃ udariyaṃ karīsaṃ (matthaluṅgaṃ), pittaṃ semhaṃ pubbo lohitaṃ sedo medo, assu vasā kheḷo siṅghāṇikā lasikā muttan'ti.
components.example_2: atha kho so, bhikkhave, mudumūsi gocarāya pakkāmi. tam'enaṃ biḷāro gahetvā sahasā saṅkhāditvā ajjhohari. tassa so mudumūsi antam'pi khādi, antaguṇam'pi khādi.

components.example_1: sañcetanikā sukkavissaṭṭhi aññatra supin'antā saṅgh'ādiseso.
components.example_2: evaṃ, bhante. sace so, bhikkhave, dārukkhandho na orimaṃ tīraṃ upagacchati, na pārimaṃ tīraṃ upagacchati, na majjhe saṃsīdissati, na thale ussīdissati, na manussaggāho gahessati, na amanussaggāho gahessati, na āvaṭṭaggāho gahessati, na antopūti bhavissati, evañ'hi so, bhikkhave, dārukkhandho samuddaninno bhavissati samuddapoṇo samuddapabbhāro. taṃ kissa hetu?

components.meaning_combo: the worst; the lowest (of); lit. end
components.example_1: antam'idaṃ, bhikkhave, jīvikānaṃ yadidaṃ piṇḍolyaṃ. abhisāpo'yaṃ, bhikkhave, lokasmiṃ, piṇḍolo vicarasi pattapāṇī'ti.

data.example_1: upasaṅkamitvā paññatte āsane nisīdi
data.example_2: atha kho therā bhikkhū yena bhagavā ten'upasaṅkamiṃsu. upasaṅkamitvā bhagavantaṃ abhivādetvā ekam'antaṃ nisīdiṃsu.

data.meaning_combo: sank emotionally; became disheartened; lit. sank down
data.example_1: yatra hi nāmā'ti yāya jātiyā sati jarā paññāyati, sā jāti dhi'r'atthu dhikkatā atthu, jigucchām'etaṃ jātin'ti, jātiyā mūlaṃ khaṇanto nisīdi, paṭhamena sallena hadaye viddho viya.

data.meaning_1: (singular) a certain; (plural) some; a few; several
data.example_1: app'ekacce bhagavatā saddhiṃ sammodiṃsu, sammodanīyaṃ kathaṃ sāraṇīyaṃ vītisāretvā ekam'antaṃ nisīdiṃsu, app'ekacce yena bhagavā ten'añjaliṃ paṇāmetvā ekam'antaṃ nisīdiṃsu, app'ekacce nāmagottaṃ sāvetvā ekam'antaṃ nisīdiṃsu
data.example_2:
dukkho itthibhāvo,
akkhāto purisadammasārathinā,
sapattikam'pi hi dukkhaṃ,
app'ekaccā sakiṃ vijātāyo.

components.example_1:
bahussuto ca medhāvī,
sīlesu susamāhito,
cetosamatham'anuyutto,
api muddhani tiṭṭhatu.

api dibbesu kāmesu,
ratiṃ so n'ādhigacchati,
taṇhakkhayarato hoti,
sammāsambuddhasāvako.
components.example_2:
disvāna taṇhaṃ aratiṃ ragañ'ca,
n'āhosi chando api methunasmiṃ,
kim'ev'idaṃ muttakarīsapuṇṇaṃ,
pādā'pi naṃ samphusituṃ na icche.

components.example_1: sacc'āhaṃ, ācariya, paṭissuṇiṃ, api-ahaṃ marissāmi, n'āhaṃ sakkomi ekena passena sattamāse nipajjitun'ti
components.example_2:
yathā'pi mūle anupaddave daḷhe,
chinno'pi rukkho punareva rūhati, 
evam'pi taṇh'ānusaye anūhate,
nibbattatī dukkham'idaṃ punappunaṃ.

components.example_1: api, samaṇa, balībadde addasā'ti?
components.example_2: addasā kho aññataro upāsako taṃ bhikkhuṃ kīṭāgirismiṃ piṇḍāya carantaṃ. disvāna yena so bhikkhu ten'upasaṅkami, upasaṅkamitvā taṃ bhikkhuṃ abhivādetvā etadavoca, api, bhante, piṇḍo labbhatī'ti?

components.example_1: api ca, udāyi, ānando diṭṭh'eva dhamme parinibbāyissatī'ti
yam'pi taṃ diṭṭhaṃ sutaṃ mutaṃ viññātaṃ pattaṃ pariyesitaṃ, anuvicaritaṃ manasā tam'pi etaṃ mama, eso'ham'asmi, eso me attā'ti samanupassati
so tena ñattena attān'ukkaṃseti, paraṃ vambheti. ayam'pi, bhikkhave, asappurisadhammo.
components.example_2: jāti'pi dukkhā, jarā'pi dukkhā, maraṇam'pi dukkhaṃ, soka-parideva-dukkha-domanass'upāyāsā'pi dukkhā

components.example_1: evam'evaṃ kho, bhikkhave, idh'ekacco bhikkhu bhikkhusaṅghaṃ piṭṭhito piṭṭhito anubandho hoti, aham'pi bhikkhu, aham'pi bhikkhū'ti.
components.example_2: idha, bhikkhave, ekaccassa puggalassa appamattakam'pi pāpakammaṃ kataṃ tam'enaṃ nirayaṃ upaneti.

components.example_1: katamā ca, sāriputta, opapātikā yoni? devā, nerayikā, ekacce ca manussā, ekacce ca vinipātikā, ayaṃ vuccati, sāriputta, opapātikā yoni.
components.example_2: ye'me, bho gotama, samaṇabrāhmaṇā saṅghino gaṇino gaṇ'ācariyā ñātā yasassino titthakarā sādhusammatā, bahujanassa… sabb'ete sakāya paṭiññāya abbhaññaṃsu sabb'eva n'ābbhaññaṃsu, udāhu ekacce abbhaññaṃsu ekacce n'ābbhaññaṃsū'ti?

components.example_1: puna caparaṃ, bhikkhave, sappuriso sabbaso n'evasaññān'āsaññ'āyatanaṃ samatikkamma saññāvedayitanirodhaṃ upasampajja viharati. paññāya c'assa disvā ekacce āsavā parikkhīṇā honti.

n'āhosi chando api methunasmiṃ,
kim'ev'idaṃ muttakarīsapuṇṇaṃ,
pādā'pi naṃ samphusituṃ na icche.

components.example_1: sacc'āhaṃ, ācariya, paṭissuṇiṃ, api-ahaṃ marissāmi, n'āhaṃ sakkomi ekena passena sattamāse nipajjitun'ti
components.example_2:
yathā'pi mūle anupaddave daḷhe,
chinno'pi rukkho punareva rūhati, 
evam'pi taṇh'ānusaye anūhate,
nibbattatī dukkham'idaṃ punappunaṃ.

components.example_1: api, samaṇa, balībadde addasā'ti?
components.example_2: addasā kho aññataro upāsako taṃ bhikkhuṃ kīṭāgirismiṃ piṇḍāya carantaṃ. disvāna yena so bhikkhu ten'upasaṅkami, upasaṅkamitvā taṃ bhikkhuṃ abhivādetvā etadavoca, api, bhante, piṇḍo labbhatī'ti?

components.example_1: api ca, udāyi, ānando diṭṭh'eva dhamme parinibbāyissatī'ti
yam'pi taṃ diṭṭhaṃ sutaṃ mutaṃ viññātaṃ pattaṃ pariyesitaṃ, anuvicaritaṃ manasā tam'pi etaṃ mama, eso'ham'asmi, eso me attā'ti samanupassati
so tena ñattena attān'ukkaṃseti, paraṃ vambheti. ayam'pi, bhikkhave, asappurisadhammo.
components.example_2: jāti'pi dukkhā, jarā'pi dukkhā, maraṇam'pi dukkhaṃ, soka-parideva-dukkha-domanass'upāyāsā'pi dukkhā

components.example_1: evam'evaṃ kho, bhikkhave, idh'ekacco bhikkhu bhikkhusaṅghaṃ piṭṭhito piṭṭhito anubandho hoti, aham'pi bhikkhu, aham'pi bhikkhū'ti.
components.example_2: idha, bhikkhave, ekaccassa puggalassa appamattakam'pi pāpakammaṃ kataṃ tam'enaṃ nirayaṃ upaneti.

components.example_1: katamā ca, sāriputta, opapātikā yoni? devā, nerayikā, ekacce ca manussā, ekacce ca vinipātikā, ayaṃ vuccati, sāriputta, opapātikā yoni.
components.example_2: ye'me, bho gotama, samaṇabrāhmaṇā saṅghino gaṇino gaṇ'ācariyā ñātā yasassino titthakarā sādhusammatā, bahujanassa… sabb'ete sakāya paṭiññāya abbhaññaṃsu sabb'eva n'ābbhaññaṃsu, udāhu ekacce abbhaññaṃsu ekacce n'ābbhaññaṃsū'ti?

components.example_1: puna caparaṃ, bhikkhave, sappuriso sabbaso n'evasaññān'āsaññ'āyatanaṃ samatikkamma saññāvedayitanirodhaṃ upasampajja viharati. paññāya c'assa disvā ekacce āsavā parikkhīṇā honti.

data.example_2:
so bajjhataṃ pāsasatehi chabbhi,
rammā vanā niyyatu rājadhāniṃ,
tuttehi so haññatu pācanehi,
bhisāni te brāhmaṇa yo ahāsi.

data.example_1: yadā arogā ahosi tadā yaṃ iccheyyāsi taṃ dajjeyyāsī'ti
data.example_2:
so bajjhataṃ pāsasatehi chabbhi,
rammā vanā niyyatu rājadhāniṃ,
tuttehi so haññatu pācanehi,
bhisāni te brāhmaṇa yo ahāsi.

data.grammar: ind, adv, instr sg of ya
data.example_1:
na tena thero so hoti,
yena-assa palitaṃ siro,
paripakko vayo tassa,
moghajiṇṇo'ti vuccati.
data.example_2: ko nu kho bho kaccāna hetu ko paccayo yena khattiyā'pi khattiyehi vivadanti brāhmaṇā'pi brāhmaṇehi vivadanti gahapatikā'pi gahapatikehi vivadantī'ti?

data.grammar: ind, adv, instr sg of ya
data.meaning_1: where; wherever; in which direction; to; towards
data.example_1: atha kho āyasmā ānando pubb'aṇhasamayaṃ nivāsetvā pattacīvaram'ādāya yena aññataro bhikkhun'upassayo ten'upasaṅkami
data.example_2: siṅgālo'pi kho, bhikkhave, addasa kummaṃ kacchapaṃ dūrato'va gocarapasutaṃ. disvāna yena kummo kacchapo ten'upasaṅkami.

data.meaning_1: Sublime One; Blessed One; Fortunate One; Auspicious One; epithet of the Buddha
data.example_1:
anejaṃ mūladassāviṃ,
atthi pañhena āgamaṃ,
kiṃ nissitā isayo manujā,
khattiyā brāhmaṇā devatānaṃ,
yaññam'akappayiṃsu puthū'dha loke,
pucchāmi taṃ bhagavā brūhi me taṃ.
data.example_2: bhagavaṃmūlakā no, bhante, dhammā bhagavaṃnettikā bhagavaṃpaṭisaraṇā. sādhu vata, bhante, bhagavantaṃ'y'eva paṭibhātu etassa bhāsitassa attho. bhagavato sutvā bhikkhū dhāressantī'ti.

data.meaning_1: Sublime One; Blessed One; Fortunate One; Auspicious One; epithet of the Buddha
data.meaning_combo: Sublime One; Blessed One; Fortunate One; Auspicious One; epithet of the Buddha; lit. having good fortune quality
data.example_1:
anejaṃ mūladassāviṃ,

data.meaning_1: hands in reverential salutation towards someone
data.example_1: atha kho candanaṅgaliko upāsako uṭṭhāy'āsanā ek'aṃsaṃ uttar'āsaṅgaṃ karitvā yena bhagavā ten'añjaliṃ paṇāmetvā bhagavantaṃ etadavoca, paṭibhāti maṃ bhagavā, paṭibhāti maṃ sugatā'ti.
data.example_2: evaṃ vutte, brahm'āyu brāhmaṇo uṭṭhāy'āsanā ek'aṃsaṃ uttar'āsaṅgaṃ karitvā yena bhagavā ten'añjaliṃ paṇāmetvā tikkhattuṃ udānaṃ udāneti

components.example_1: ekam'antaṃ nisinnā kho tā bhikkhuniyo āyasmantaṃ ānandaṃ etadavocuṃ
components.example_2: idha cunda ekacco anabhijjhālu hoti. yaṃ taṃ parassa paravitt'ūpakaraṇaṃ taṃ anabhijjhitā hoti, aho vata yaṃ parassa taṃ mamassā'ti

components.example_1: ekam'antaṃ nisinnā kho tā bhikkhuniyo āyasmantaṃ ānandaṃ etadavocuṃ
components.example_2: idha cunda ekacco anabhijjhālu hoti. yaṃ taṃ parassa paravitt'ūpakaraṇaṃ taṃ anabhijjhitā hoti, aho vata yaṃ parassa taṃ mamassā'ti

components.grammar: ind, adv, instr sg of ta
components.meaning_1: thereby; because of that; on that account
components.meaning_combo: thereby; because of that; on that account; lit. by that; with that
components.example_1: tena, bhikkhave, bhikkhunā tesaṃ'y'eva pāpakānaṃ akusalānaṃ dhammānaṃ pahānāya adhimatto chando ca vāyāmo ca ussāho ca ussoḷhī ca appaṭivānī ca sati ca sampajaññañ'ca karaṇīyaṃ.
components.example_2:
yo bālo maññati bālyaṃ,
paṇḍito vā'pi tena so,
bālo ca paṇḍitamānī,
sa ve bālo'ti vuccati.

components.grammar: ind, adv, instr sg of ta
components.example_1:
yena yena subhikkhāni,
sivāni abhayāni ca,
tena puttaka gacchassu,
mā sokāpahato bhavā'ti.
components.example_2: atha kho ambaṭṭho māṇavo yena so vihāro saṃvutadvāro, tena appasaddo upasaṅkamitvā ataramāno āḷindaṃ pavisitvā ukkāsitvā aggaḷaṃ ākoṭesi. vivari bhagavā dvāraṃ.

components.meaning_1: palms placed together (as a token of respect)
components.example_1: tena kuṭikārakena bhikkhunā kuṭivatthuṃ sodhetvā saṅghaṃ upasaṅkamitvā ek'aṃsaṃ uttar'āsaṅgaṃ karitvā vuḍḍhānaṃ bhikkhūnaṃ pāde vanditvā ukkuṭikaṃ nisīditvā añjaliṃ paggahetvā evam'assa vacanīyo
components.example_2: tassa heṭṭhābhāgaṃ sodhāpetvā pākāraparikkhepaṃ kārāpetvā vālukaṃ okirāpetvā dhajapaṭākaṃ ussāpetvā vanappatiṃ alaṅ'karitvā añjaliṃ karitvā, sace puttaṃ vā dhītaraṃ vā labheyyaṃ, tumhākaṃ mahāsakkāraṃ karissāmī'ti patthanaṃ katvā pakkāmi.

components.meaning_1: hands cupped together (to drink water or hold some item)
components.meaning_combo: hands cupped together (to drink water or hold some item)
components.example_1: so taṃ pokkharaṇiṃ ogāhetvā ubhohi hatthehi itic'iti ca sevālapaṇakaṃ apaviyūhitvā añjalinā pivitvā pakkameyya.
components.example_2: seyyathā'pi, devānam'inda, gāmassa vā nigamassa vā avidūre mahādhaññarāsi. tato mahājanakāyo dhaññaṃ āhareyya, kājehi'pi piṭakehi'pi ucchaṅgehi'pi añjalīhi'pi.

data.meaning_combo: having dismissed; having dispelled; lit. having caused to bend forward
data.example_1: atha kho bhagavā kismiñci'd'eva pakaraṇe bhikkhusaṅghaṃ paṇāmetvā pubb'aṇhasamayaṃ nivāsetvā pattacīvaram'ādāya kapilavatthuṃ piṇḍāya pāvisi
data.example_2:
niddaṃ tandiṃ vijambhitaṃ,
aratiṃ bhattasammadaṃ,
vīriyena naṃ paṇāmetvā,
ariyamaggo visujjhatī'ti.

data.meaning_1: (of hands) having stretched out (in reverential salutation)
data.example_1: evaṃ vutte, brahm'āyu brāhmaṇo uṭṭhāy'āsanā ek'aṃsaṃ uttar'āsaṅgaṃ karitvā yena bhagavā ten'añjaliṃ paṇāmetvā tikkhattuṃ udānaṃ udāneti
data.example_2: atha kho āyasmā ānando abhikkantāya rattiyā, nikkhante paṭhame yāme, uṭṭhāy'āsanā ek'aṃsaṃ uttar'āsaṅgaṃ karitvā yena bhagavā ten'añjaliṃ paṇāmetvā bhagavantaṃ etadavoca

data.grammar: ind, adv, comp, acc sg of ekamanta
data.example_1: atha kho bhagavā kumbhakār'āvesanaṃ pavisitvā ekam'antaṃ tiṇasanthārakaṃ paññāpetvā nisīdi pallaṅkaṃ ābhujitvā ujuṃ kāyaṃ paṇidhāya parimukhaṃ satiṃ upaṭṭhapetvā.
data.example_2: tena kho pana samayena kasibhāradvājassa brāhmaṇassa parivesanā vattati. atha kho bhagavā yena parivesanā ten'upasaṅkami, upasaṅkamitvā ekam'antaṃ aṭṭhāsi.

components.example_1: seyyathā'pi, bhikkhave, mahāsamuddo ekaraso loṇaraso, evam'eva kho, bhikkhave, ayaṃ dhammavinayo ekaraso vimuttiraso
components.example_2:
yo ca gāthā sataṃ bhāse,
anatthapadasaṃhitā,
ekaṃ dhammapadaṃ seyyo,
yaṃ sutvā upasammati.

components.example_1:
yo ca vassasataṃ jantu,
aggiṃ paricare vane,
ekañ'ca bhāvit'attānaṃ,
muhuttam'api pūjaye,
sā'y'eva pūjanā seyyo,
yañ'ce vassasataṃ hutaṃ.
components.example_2: atīte kira kassapasammāsambuddhakāle gāmavāsī eko kuṭumbiko ekassa therassa vihāraṃ katvā taṃ tattha viharantaṃ catūhi paccayehi upaṭṭhahi

components.example_1:
supupphit'aggaṃ upagamma bhikkhuni,
ekā tuvaṃ tiṭṭhasi sālamūle,
na c'atthi te dutiyā vaṇṇadhātu,
bāle na tvaṃ bhāyasi dhuttakānan'ti.
components.example_2: so eko gāmaṃ piṇḍāya pavisati eko paṭikkamati eko raho nisīdati eko caṅkamaṃ adhiṭṭhāti.

components.example_1: tesam'assa ekaputtako piyo manāpo
components.example_2:
mātā yathā niyaṃ puttaṃ āyusā ekaputtam'anurakkhe, 
evam'pi sabbabhūtesu,
mānasam'bhāvaye aparimāṇaṃ.

components.example_1: yo pana bhikkhu bhikkhuniyā saddhiṃ saṃvidhāya ek'addhānamaggaṃ paṭipajjeyya antamaso gām'antaram'pi aññatra samayā, pācittiyaṃ. tatth'āyaṃ samayo, satthagamanīyo hoti maggo, sāsaṅkasammato, sappaṭibhayo, ayaṃ tattha samayo.
components.example_2: yo pana bhikkhu bhikkhuniyā saddhiṃ saṃvidhāya ekaṃ nāvaṃ abhiruheyya uddhaṃgāminiṃ vā adhogāminiṃ vā aññatra tiriyaṃ taraṇāya, pācittiyaṃ.

components.meaning_1: one thing; single thing; a certain thing
components.meaning_combo: one thing; single thing; a certain thing
components.example_1: ye āsavā saṃkilesikā ponobbhavikā sadarā dukkhavipākā āyatiṃ jātijarāmaraṇiyā, appahīnā te tathāgatassa, tasmā tathāgato saṅkhāy'ekaṃ paṭisevati, saṅkhāy'ekaṃ adhivāseti, saṅkhāy'ekaṃ parivajjeti, saṅkhāy'ekaṃ vinodetī'ti?
yattha nu kho, bhante, na jāyati na jīyati na mīyati na cavati na upapajjati, sakkā nu kho so, bhante, gamanena lokassa anto ñātuṃ vā daṭṭhuṃ vā pāpuṇituṃ vā'ti?
components.example_2:
es'ūpamā dāmali brāhmaṇassa,
khīṇ'āsavassa nipakassa jhāyino,
pappuyya jātimaraṇassa antaṃ,
n'āyūhatī pāragato hi so'ti.

components.example_1:
ubhosu antesu vineyya chandaṃ,
phassaṃ pariññāya anānugiddho,
yadattagarahī tadakubbamāno,
na lippatī diṭṭhasutesu dhīro.
components.example_2: evaṃ vutte aññataro bhikkhu there bhikkhū etadavoca, phasso kho, āvuso, eko anto, phassasamudayo dutiyo anto, phassanirodho majjhe, taṇhā sibbinī.

components.meaning_1: ending up as; finishing in; resulting in
components.meaning_combo: ending up as; finishing in; resulting in
components.example_1: kāpotakāni aṭṭhīni bhavanti. bhass'antā āhutiyo, dattupaññattaṃ yadidaṃ dānaṃ. tesaṃ tucchā musā vilāpo ye keci atthikavādaṃ vadanti.
atthi imasmiṃ kāye… antaṃ antaguṇaṃ udariyaṃ karīsaṃ (matthaluṅgaṃ), pittaṃ semhaṃ pubbo lohitaṃ sedo medo, assu vasā kheḷo siṅghāṇikā lasikā muttan'ti.
components.example_2: atha kho so, bhikkhave, mudumūsi gocarāya pakkāmi. tam'enaṃ biḷāro gahetvā sahasā saṅkhāditvā ajjhohari. tassa so mudumūsi antam'pi khādi, antaguṇam'pi khādi.

components.example_1: sañcetanikā sukkavissaṭṭhi aññatra supin'antā saṅgh'ādiseso.
components.example_2: evaṃ, bhante. sace so, bhikkhave, dārukkhandho na orimaṃ tīraṃ upagacchati, na pārimaṃ tīraṃ upagacchati, na majjhe saṃsīdissati, na thale ussīdissati, na manussaggāho gahessati, na amanussaggāho gahessati, na āvaṭṭaggāho gahessati, na antopūti bhavissati, evañ'hi so, bhikkhave, dārukkhandho samuddaninno bhavissati samuddapoṇo samuddapabbhāro. taṃ kissa hetu?

components.meaning_combo: the worst; the lowest (of); lit. end
components.example_1: antam'idaṃ, bhikkhave, jīvikānaṃ yadidaṃ piṇḍolyaṃ. abhisāpo'yaṃ, bhikkhave, lokasmiṃ, piṇḍolo vicarasi pattapāṇī'ti.

data.grammar: ind, adv, comp, acc sg of ekamanta

components.example_1: seyyathā'pi, bhikkhave, mahāsamuddo ekaraso loṇaraso, evam'eva kho, bhikkhave, ayaṃ dhammavinayo ekaraso vimuttiraso
components.example_2:
yo ca gāthā sataṃ bhāse,
anatthapadasaṃhitā,
ekaṃ dhammapadaṃ seyyo,
yaṃ sutvā upasammati.

components.example_1:
yo ca vassasataṃ jantu,
aggiṃ paricare vane,
ekañ'ca bhāvit'attānaṃ,
muhuttam'api pūjaye,
sā'y'eva pūjanā seyyo,
yañ'ce vassasataṃ hutaṃ.
components.example_2: atīte kira kassapasammāsambuddhakāle gāmavāsī eko kuṭumbiko ekassa therassa vihāraṃ katvā taṃ tattha viharantaṃ catūhi paccayehi upaṭṭhahi

components.example_1:
supupphit'aggaṃ upagamma bhikkhuni,
ekā tuvaṃ tiṭṭhasi sālamūle,
na c'atthi te dutiyā vaṇṇadhātu,
bāle na tvaṃ bhāyasi dhuttakānan'ti.
components.example_2: so eko gāmaṃ piṇḍāya pavisati eko paṭikkamati eko raho nisīdati eko caṅkamaṃ adhiṭṭhāti.

components.example_1: tesam'assa ekaputtako piyo manāpo
components.example_2:
mātā yathā niyaṃ puttaṃ āyusā ekaputtam'anurakkhe, 
evam'pi sabbabhūtesu,
mānasam'bhāvaye aparimāṇaṃ.

components.example_1: yo pana bhikkhu bhikkhuniyā saddhiṃ saṃvidhāya ek'addhānamaggaṃ paṭipajjeyya antamaso gām'antaram'pi aññatra samayā, pācittiyaṃ. tatth'āyaṃ samayo, satthagamanīyo hoti maggo, sāsaṅkasammato, sappaṭibhayo, ayaṃ tattha samayo.
components.example_2: yo pana bhikkhu bhikkhuniyā saddhiṃ saṃvidhāya ekaṃ nāvaṃ abhiruheyya uddhaṃgāminiṃ vā adhogāminiṃ vā aññatra tiriyaṃ taraṇāya, pācittiyaṃ.

components.example_1: antam'idaṃ, bhikkhave, jīvikānaṃ yadidaṃ piṇḍolyaṃ. abhisāpo'yaṃ, bhikkhave, lokasmiṃ, piṇḍolo vicarasi pattapāṇī'ti.

data.example_1: upasaṅkamitvā paññatte āsane nisīdi
data.example_2: atha kho therā bhikkhū yena bhagavā ten'upasaṅkamiṃsu. upasaṅkamitvā bhagavantaṃ abhivādetvā ekam'antaṃ nisīdiṃsu.

data.meaning_combo: sank emotionally; became disheartened; lit. sank down
data.example_1: yatra hi nāmā'ti yāya jātiyā sati jarā paññāyati, sā jāti dhi'r'atthu dhikkatā atthu, jigucchām'etaṃ jātin'ti, jātiyā mūlaṃ khaṇanto nisīdi, paṭhamena sallena hadaye viddho viya.

data.meaning_1: (singular) a certain; (plural) some; a few; several
data.example_1: app'ekacce bhagavatā saddhiṃ sammodiṃsu, sammodanīyaṃ kathaṃ sāraṇīyaṃ vītisāretvā ekam'antaṃ nisīdiṃsu, app'ekacce yena bhagavā ten'añjaliṃ paṇāmetvā ekam'antaṃ nisīdiṃsu, app'ekacce nāmagottaṃ sāvetvā ekam'antaṃ nisīdiṃsu
data.example_2:
dukkho itthibhāvo,
akkhāto purisadammasārathinā,
sapattikam'pi hi dukkhaṃ,
app'ekaccā sakiṃ vijātāyo.

components.example_1:
bahussuto ca medhāvī,
sīlesu susamāhito,
cetosamatham'anuyutto,
api muddhani tiṭṭhatu.

api dibbesu kāmesu,
ratiṃ so n'ādhigacchati,
taṇhakkhayarato hoti,
sammāsambuddhasāvako.
components.example_2:
disvāna taṇhaṃ aratiṃ ragañ'ca,
n'āhosi chando api methunasmiṃ,
kim'ev'idaṃ muttakarīsapuṇṇaṃ,
pādā'pi naṃ samphusituṃ na icche.

components.example_1: sacc'āhaṃ, ācariya, paṭissuṇiṃ, api-ahaṃ marissāmi, n'āhaṃ sakkomi ekena passena sattamāse nipajjitun'ti
components.example_2:
yathā'pi mūle anupaddave daḷhe,
chinno'pi rukkho punareva rūhati, 
evam'pi taṇh'ānusaye anūhate,
nibbattatī dukkham'idaṃ punappunaṃ.

components.example_1: api, samaṇa, balībadde addasā'ti?
components.example_2: addasā kho aññataro upāsako taṃ bhikkhuṃ kīṭāgirismiṃ piṇḍāya carantaṃ. disvāna yena so bhikkhu ten'upasaṅkami, upasaṅkamitvā taṃ bhikkhuṃ abhivādetvā etadavoca, api, bhante, piṇḍo labbhatī'ti?

components.example_1: api ca, udāyi, ānando diṭṭh'eva dhamme parinibbāyissatī'ti
yam'pi taṃ diṭṭhaṃ sutaṃ mutaṃ viññātaṃ pattaṃ pariyesitaṃ, anuvicaritaṃ manasā tam'pi etaṃ mama, eso'ham'asmi, eso me attā'ti samanupassati
so tena ñattena attān'ukkaṃseti, paraṃ vambheti. ayam'pi, bhikkhave, asappurisadhammo.
components.example_2: jāti'pi dukkhā, jarā'pi dukkhā, maraṇam'pi dukkhaṃ, soka-parideva-dukkha-domanass'upāyāsā'pi dukkhā

components.example_1: evam'evaṃ kho, bhikkhave, idh'ekacco bhikkhu bhikkhusaṅghaṃ piṭṭhito piṭṭhito anubandho hoti, aham'pi bhikkhu, aham'pi bhikkhū'ti.
components.example_2: idha, bhikkhave, ekaccassa puggalassa appamattakam'pi pāpakammaṃ kataṃ tam'enaṃ nirayaṃ upaneti.

components.example_1: katamā ca, sāriputta, opapātikā yoni? devā, nerayikā, ekacce ca manussā, ekacce ca vinipātikā, ayaṃ vuccati, sāriputta, opapātikā yoni.
components.example_2: ye'me, bho gotama, samaṇabrāhmaṇā saṅghino gaṇino gaṇ'ācariyā ñātā yasassino titthakarā sādhusammatā, bahujanassa… sabb'ete sakāya paṭiññāya abbhaññaṃsu sabb'eva n'ābbhaññaṃsu, udāhu ekacce abbhaññaṃsu ekacce n'ābbhaññaṃsū'ti?

components.example_1: puna caparaṃ, bhikkhave, sappuriso sabbaso n'evasaññān'āsaññ'āyatanaṃ samatikkamma saññāvedayitanirodhaṃ upasampajja viharati. paññāya c'assa disvā ekacce āsavā parikkhīṇā honti.

api muddhani tiṭṭhatu.

api dibbesu kāmesu,
ratiṃ so n'ādhigacchati,
taṇhakkhayarato hoti,
sammāsambuddhasāvako.
components.example_2:
disvāna taṇhaṃ aratiṃ ragañ'ca,
n'āhosi chando api methunasmiṃ,
kim'ev'idaṃ muttakarīsapuṇṇaṃ,
pādā'pi naṃ samphusituṃ na icche.

components.example_1: sacc'āhaṃ, ācariya, paṭissuṇiṃ, api-ahaṃ marissāmi, n'āhaṃ sakkomi ekena passena sattamāse nipajjitun'ti
components.example_2:
yathā'pi mūle anupaddave daḷhe,
chinno'pi rukkho punareva rūhati, 
evam'pi taṇh'ānusaye anūhate,
nibbattatī dukkham'idaṃ punappunaṃ.

components.example_1: api, samaṇa, balībadde addasā'ti?
components.example_2: addasā kho aññataro upāsako taṃ bhikkhuṃ kīṭāgirismiṃ piṇḍāya carantaṃ. disvāna yena so bhikkhu ten'upasaṅkami, upasaṅkamitvā taṃ bhikkhuṃ abhivādetvā etadavoca, api, bhante, piṇḍo labbhatī'ti?

components.example_1: api ca, udāyi, ānando diṭṭh'eva dhamme parinibbāyissatī'ti
yam'pi taṃ diṭṭhaṃ sutaṃ mutaṃ viññātaṃ pattaṃ pariyesitaṃ, anuvicaritaṃ manasā tam'pi etaṃ mama, eso'ham'asmi, eso me attā'ti samanupassati
so tena ñattena attān'ukkaṃseti, paraṃ vambheti. ayam'pi, bhikkhave, asappurisadhammo.
components.example_2: jāti'pi dukkhā, jarā'pi dukkhā, maraṇam'pi dukkhaṃ, soka-parideva-dukkha-domanass'upāyāsā'pi dukkhā

components.example_1: evam'evaṃ kho, bhikkhave, idh'ekacco bhikkhu bhikkhusaṅghaṃ piṭṭhito piṭṭhito anubandho hoti, aham'pi bhikkhu, aham'pi bhikkhū'ti.
components.example_2: idha, bhikkhave, ekaccassa puggalassa appamattakam'pi pāpakammaṃ kataṃ tam'enaṃ nirayaṃ upaneti.

components.example_1: katamā ca, sāriputta, opapātikā yoni? devā, nerayikā, ekacce ca manussā, ekacce ca vinipātikā, ayaṃ vuccati, sāriputta, opapātikā yoni.
components.example_2: ye'me, bho gotama, samaṇabrāhmaṇā saṅghino gaṇino gaṇ'ācariyā ñātā yasassino titthakarā sādhusammatā, bahujanassa… sabb'ete sakāya paṭiññāya abbhaññaṃsu sabb'eva n'ābbhaññaṃsu, udāhu ekacce abbhaññaṃsu ekacce n'ābbhaññaṃsū'ti?

components.example_1: puna caparaṃ, bhikkhave, sappuriso sabbaso n'evasaññān'āsaññ'āyatanaṃ samatikkamma saññāvedayitanirodhaṃ upasampajja viharati. paññāya c'assa disvā ekacce āsavā parikkhīṇā honti.

data.meaning_1: Sublime One; Blessed One; Fortunate One; Auspicious One; epithet of the Buddha
data.meaning_combo: Sublime One; Blessed One; Fortunate One; Auspicious One; epithet of the Buddha; lit. having good fortune quality
data.example_1:
anejaṃ mūladassāviṃ,
atthi pañhena āgamaṃ,
kiṃ nissitā isayo manujā,
khattiyā brāhmaṇā devatānaṃ,
yaññam'akappayiṃsu puthū'dha loke,
pucchāmi taṃ bhagavā brūhi me taṃ.
data.example_2: bhagavaṃmūlakā no, bhante, dhammā bhagavaṃnettikā bhagavaṃpaṭisaraṇā. sādhu vata, bhante, bhagavantaṃ'y'eva paṭibhātu etassa bhāsitassa attho. bhagavato sutvā bhikkhū dhāressantī'ti.

ehi nandaka gacchāma,
upajjhāyassa santikaṃ,
sīhanādaṃ nadissāma,
buddhaseṭṭhassa sammukhā.
data.example_2: tasmiṃ samaye catusattatisahassajaṭilā paṇītapaṇītāni ojavantāni phal'āphalāni gahetvā ācariyassa santikaṃ sampattā buddhānañ'c'eva ācariyassa ca nisinnāsanaṃ oloketvā āhaṃsu.

data.example_1:
ehi nandaka gacchāma,
upajjhāyassa santikaṃ,
sīhanādaṃ nadissāma,
buddhaseṭṭhassa sammukhā.
data.example_2: tasmiṃ samaye catusattatisahassajaṭilā paṇītapaṇītāni ojavantāni phal'āphalāni gahetvā ācariyassa santikaṃ sampattā buddhānañ'c'eva ācariyassa ca nisinnāsanaṃ oloketvā āhaṃsu.

data.example_1:
na'y'idaṃ anayena jīvitaṃ,
n'āhāro hadayassa santiko,
āhāraṭṭhitiko samussayo,
iti disvāna carāmi esanaṃ.

components.example_1:
socanti janā mamāyite,
na hi santi niccā pariggahā,
vinābhāva'santam'ev'idaṃ,
iti disvā n'āgāram'āvase.
components.example_2: so ñātakehi nīyamāno appatvā'va ñātake antarāmagge kālaṃ karoti. evarūpo'pi, bhikkhave, idh'ekacco yodh'ājīvo hoti. ayaṃ, bhikkhave, dutiyo yodh'ājīvo santo saṃvijjamāno lokasmiṃ.

components.example_1: kiṃ saṅghassa pubbakiccaṃ? pārisuddhiṃ āyasmanto ārocetha, pātimokkhaṃ uddisissāmi, taṃ sabb'eva santā sādhukaṃ suṇoma manasi karoma.

uṭṭhahatha nisīdatha,
daḷhaṃ sikkhatha santiyā,
mā vo pamatte viññāya,
maccurājā amohayittha vas'ānuge.
components.example_2:
etañ'ca dhammam'aññāya,
vicinaṃ bhikkhu sadā sato sikkhe,
santī'ti nibbutiṃ ñatvā,
sāsane gotamassa na pamajjeyya.

components.example_1:
yāya mātu bhato poso,
imaṃ lokaṃ avekkhati,
tam'pi pāṇadadiṃ santiṃ,
hanti kuddho puthujjano.
components.example_2: santi idh'ekacce khattiyā, brāhmaṇā'ti bhaṇati

components.example_1: idha, visākhe, mātugāmo yo so bhattu abbhantaro antojano, dāsā'ti vā pessā'ti vā kammakarā'ti vā, tesaṃ katañ'ca katato jānāti akatañ'ca akatato jānāti, gilānakānañ'ca bal'ābalaṃ jānāti khādanīyaṃ bhojanīyañ'c'assa paccaṃsena saṃvibhajati.
components.example_2: n'āhaṃ, bhikkhave, aññaṃ ekadhammam'pi samanupassāmi yaṃ evaṃ lahuparivattaṃ yatha'y'idaṃ cittaṃ. yāvañ'c'idaṃ, bhikkhave, upamā'pi na sukarā yāva lahuparivattaṃ cittan'ti.

components.example_1:
mahiñ'ca pana ṭhito anonamanto,
phusati karehi ubhohi jaṇṇukāni,
mahiruhaparimaṇḍalo ahosi,
sucaritakammavipākasesakena.

data.grammar: ind, prep, loc sg of santika
data.meaning_1: to; in the presence (of); near (to); nearby; close (to); on the verge (of)
data.example_1:
satañ'ca vivaṭaṃ hoti,
āloko passatām'iva,
santike na vijānanti,
magā dhammass'akovidā.
data.example_2:
n'atthi jhānaṃ apaññassa,
paññā n'atthi ajhāyato,
yamhi jhānañ'ca paññā ca,
sa ve nibbānasantike.

data.grammar: ind, adv, loc sg of santika
data.example_1:
kusaggen'udakam'ādāya,
samudde udakaṃ mine,
evaṃ mānusakā kāmā,
dibbakāmāna santike.

data.meaning_1: (a game variously called) jackstraws; spillikins; spellicans; pick-up-sticks
data.meaning_combo: (a game variously called) jackstraws; spillikins; spellicans; pick-up-sticks
data.example_1: yathā vā pan'eke bhonto samaṇabrāhmaṇā saddhādeyyāni bhojanāni bhuñjitvā te evarūpaṃ jūtappamādaṭṭhān'ānuyogaṃ anuyuttā viharanti, seyyath'idaṃ, aṭṭhapadaṃ dasapadaṃ ākāsaṃ parihārapathaṃ santikaṃ khalikaṃ ghaṭikaṃ

data.meaning_1: first name and surname; name and family clan
data.meaning_combo: first name and surname; name and family clan
data.example_1: agārasmā anagāriyaṃ pabbajitvā jahanti purimāni nāmagottāni, samaṇā sakyaputtiyātv'eva saṅkhaṃ gacchanti, mahāsamuddo'tv'eva saṅkhaṃ gacchanti
data.example_2:
rūpaṃ jīrati maccānaṃ,
nāmagottaṃ na jīrati,
rāgo uppatho'ti vuccati,
lobho dhammānaṃ paripantho,
vayo rattin'divakkhayo.

components.example_1: seyyathā'pi nāma balavā puriso samiñjitaṃ vā bāhaṃ pasāreyya
components.example_2:
sīlagandhasamo gandho,
kuto nāma bhavissati,
yo samaṃ anuvāte ca,
paṭivāte ca vāyati.

components.meaning_1: called; means; by the name of; namely
components.meaning_combo: called; means; by the name of; namely; lit. name
components.example_1: evaṃ me sutaṃ, ekaṃ samayaṃ bhagavā aṅgesu viharati assapuraṃ nāma aṅgānaṃ nigamo.
components.example_2: bhūtapubbaṃ, bhikkhave, dasārahānaṃ ānako nāma mudiṅgo ahosi. tassa dasārahā ānake ghaṭite aññaṃ āṇiṃ odahiṃsu.

components.example_1: app'ekacce maṃ paccuggantvā pattacīvaraṃ paṭiggahesuṃ, app'ekacce āsanaṃ paññapesuṃ, app'ekacce pād'odakaṃ upaṭṭhapesuṃ. api ca kho maṃ nāmena ca āvusovādena ca samudācaranti.
components.example_2:
tath'ev'ime catubbaṇṇā,
pabbajitvā tav'antike,
jahanti purimaṃ nāmaṃ,
buddhaputtā'ti ñāyare.

components.meaning_1: mental objects of consciousness; mentality; mental factors of feeling, perception, intention, contact and attention
components.meaning_combo: mental objects of consciousness; mentality; mental factors of feeling, perception, intention, contact and attention; lit. name
components.example_1:
kattha āpo ca pathavī,
tejo vāyo na gādhati,
kattha dīghañ'ca rassañ'ca,
aṇuṃ thūlaṃ subh'āsubhaṃ,
kattha nāmañ'ca rūpañ'ca,
asesaṃ uparujjhatī'ti?
components.example_2: evaṃ vutte aññataro bhikkhu there bhikkhū etadavoca, nāmaṃ kho, āvuso, eko anto, rūpaṃ dutiyo anto, viññāṇaṃ majjhe, taṇhā sibbinī.

components.example_1: ko nāmo āyasmā, kathañ'ca pan'āyasmantaṃ sabrahmacārī jānantī'ti? ānando'ti kho me, āvuso, nāmaṃ. ānando'ti ca pana maṃ sabrahmacārī jānantī'ti.

na jaṭāhi na gottena,
na jaccā hoti brāhmaṇo,
yamhi saccañ'ca dhammo ca,
so sucī so ca brāhmaṇo.
components.example_2: yā tā māturakkhitā piturakkhitā mātāpiturakkhitā bhāturakkhitā bhaginirakkhitā ñātirakkhitā gottarakkhitā dhammarakkhitā sasāmikā saparidaṇḍā antamaso mālāguḷa-parikkhittā'pi

components.meaning_1: belonging to a family clan; of lineage
components.meaning_combo: belonging to a family clan; of lineage
components.example_1: so tato cuto amutra udapādiṃ, tatrā'p'āsiṃ evaṃnāmo evaṃgotto evaṃvaṇṇo evam'āhāro evaṃsukhadukkhappaṭisaṃvedī evam'āyupariyanto, so tato cuto idh'ūpapanno'ti.

data.meaning_1: first name and surname; name and family clan
data.example_1: agārasmā anagāriyaṃ pabbajitvā jahanti purimāni nāmagottāni, samaṇā sakyaputtiyātv'eva saṅkhaṃ gacchanti, mahāsamuddo'tv'eva saṅkhaṃ gacchanti
data.example_2:
rūpaṃ jīrati maccānaṃ,
nāmagottaṃ na jīrati,
rāgo uppatho'ti vuccati,
lobho dhammānaṃ paripantho,
vayo rattin'divakkhayo.

components.example_1: seyyathā'pi nāma balavā puriso samiñjitaṃ vā bāhaṃ pasāreyya
components.example_2:
sīlagandhasamo gandho,
kuto nāma bhavissati,
yo samaṃ anuvāte ca,
paṭivāte ca vāyati.

components.meaning_1: belonging to a family clan; of lineage
components.meaning_combo: belonging to a family clan; of lineage
components.example_1: so tato cuto amutra udapādiṃ, tatrā'p'āsiṃ evaṃnāmo evaṃgotto evaṃvaṇṇo evam'āhāro evaṃsukhadukkhappaṭisaṃvedī evam'āyupariyanto, so tato cuto idh'ūpapanno'ti.

data.meaning_combo: having announced; having stated; lit. having caused to hear
data.example_1: app'ekacce yena bhagavā ten'añjaliṃ paṇāmetvā ekam'antaṃ nisīdiṃsu, app'ekacce bhagavato santike nāmagottaṃ sāvetvā ekam'antaṃ nisīdiṃsu, app'ekacce tuṇhībhūtā ekam'antaṃ nisīdiṃsu.

data.grammar: ind, adv, comp, acc sg of ekamanta
data.example_1: atha kho bhagavā kumbhakār'āvesanaṃ pavisitvā ekam'antaṃ tiṇasanthārakaṃ paññāpetvā nisīdi pallaṅkaṃ ābhujitvā ujuṃ kāyaṃ paṇidhāya parimukhaṃ satiṃ upaṭṭhapetvā.
data.example_2: tena kho pana samayena kasibhāradvājassa brāhmaṇassa parivesanā vattati. atha kho bhagavā yena parivesanā ten'upasaṅkami, upasaṅkamitvā ekam'antaṃ aṭṭhāsi.

components.example_1: seyyathā'pi, bhikkhave, mahāsamuddo ekaraso loṇaraso, evam'eva kho, bhikkhave, ayaṃ dhammavinayo ekaraso vimuttiraso
components.example_2:
yo ca gāthā sataṃ bhāse,
anatthapadasaṃhitā,
ekaṃ dhammapadaṃ seyyo,
yaṃ sutvā upasammati.

components.example_1:
yo ca vassasataṃ jantu,
aggiṃ paricare vane,
ekañ'ca bhāvit'attānaṃ,
muhuttam'api pūjaye,
sā'y'eva pūjanā seyyo,
yañ'ce vassasataṃ hutaṃ.
components.example_2: atīte kira kassapasammāsambuddhakāle gāmavāsī eko kuṭumbiko ekassa therassa vihāraṃ katvā taṃ tattha viharantaṃ catūhi paccayehi upaṭṭhahi

components.example_1:
supupphit'aggaṃ upagamma bhikkhuni,
ekā tuvaṃ tiṭṭhasi sālamūle,
na c'atthi te dutiyā vaṇṇadhātu,
bāle na tvaṃ bhāyasi dhuttakānan'ti.
components.example_2: so eko gāmaṃ piṇḍāya pavisati eko paṭikkamati eko raho nisīdati eko caṅkamaṃ adhiṭṭhāti.

components.example_1: tesam'assa ekaputtako piyo manāpo
components.example_2:
mātā yathā niyaṃ puttaṃ āyusā ekaputtam'anurakkhe, 
evam'pi sabbabhūtesu,
mānasam'bhāvaye aparimāṇaṃ.

components.example_1: yo pana bhikkhu bhikkhuniyā saddhiṃ saṃvidhāya ek'addhānamaggaṃ paṭipajjeyya antamaso gām'antaram'pi aññatra samayā, pācittiyaṃ. tatth'āyaṃ samayo, satthagamanīyo hoti maggo, sāsaṅkasammato, sappaṭibhayo, ayaṃ tattha samayo.
components.example_2: yo pana bhikkhu bhikkhuniyā saddhiṃ saṃvidhāya ekaṃ nāvaṃ abhiruheyya uddhaṃgāminiṃ vā adhogāminiṃ vā aññatra tiriyaṃ taraṇāya, pācittiyaṃ.

components.meaning_1: one thing; single thing; a certain thing
components.meaning_combo: one thing; single thing; a certain thing
components.example_1: ye āsavā saṃkilesikā ponobbhavikā sadarā dukkhavipākā āyatiṃ jātijarāmaraṇiyā, appahīnā te tathāgatassa, tasmā tathāgato saṅkhāy'ekaṃ paṭisevati, saṅkhāy'ekaṃ adhivāseti, saṅkhāy'ekaṃ parivajjeti, saṅkhāy'ekaṃ vinodetī'ti?
yattha nu kho, bhante, na jāyati na jīyati na mīyati na cavati na upapajjati, sakkā nu kho so, bhante, gamanena lokassa anto ñātuṃ vā daṭṭhuṃ vā pāpuṇituṃ vā'ti?
components.example_2:
es'ūpamā dāmali brāhmaṇassa,
khīṇ'āsavassa nipakassa jhāyino,
pappuyya jātimaraṇassa antaṃ,
n'āyūhatī pāragato hi so'ti.

components.example_1:
ubhosu antesu vineyya chandaṃ,
phassaṃ pariññāya anānugiddho,
yadattagarahī tadakubbamāno,
na lippatī diṭṭhasutesu dhīro.
components.example_2: evaṃ vutte aññataro bhikkhu there bhikkhū etadavoca, phasso kho, āvuso, eko anto, phassasamudayo dutiyo anto, phassanirodho majjhe, taṇhā sibbinī.

components.meaning_1: ending up as; finishing in; resulting in
components.meaning_combo: ending up as; finishing in; resulting in
components.example_1: kāpotakāni aṭṭhīni bhavanti. bhass'antā āhutiyo, dattupaññattaṃ yadidaṃ dānaṃ. tesaṃ tucchā musā vilāpo ye keci atthikavādaṃ vadanti.
atthi imasmiṃ kāye… antaṃ antaguṇaṃ udariyaṃ karīsaṃ (matthaluṅgaṃ), pittaṃ semhaṃ pubbo lohitaṃ sedo medo, assu vasā kheḷo siṅghāṇikā lasikā muttan'ti.
components.example_2: atha kho so, bhikkhave, mudumūsi gocarāya pakkāmi. tam'enaṃ biḷāro gahetvā sahasā saṅkhāditvā ajjhohari. tassa so mudumūsi antam'pi khādi, antaguṇam'pi khādi.

components.example_1: sañcetanikā sukkavissaṭṭhi aññatra supin'antā saṅgh'ādiseso.
components.example_2: evaṃ, bhante. sace so, bhikkhave, dārukkhandho na orimaṃ tīraṃ upagacchati, na pārimaṃ tīraṃ upagacchati, na majjhe saṃsīdissati, na thale ussīdissati, na manussaggāho gahessati, na amanussaggāho gahessati, na āvaṭṭaggāho gahessati, na antopūti bhavissati, evañ'hi so, bhikkhave, dārukkhandho samuddaninno bhavissati samuddapoṇo samuddapabbhāro. taṃ kissa hetu?

components.meaning_combo: the worst; the lowest (of); lit. end
components.example_1: antam'idaṃ, bhikkhave, jīvikānaṃ yadidaṃ piṇḍolyaṃ. abhisāpo'yaṃ, bhikkhave, lokasmiṃ, piṇḍolo vicarasi pattapāṇī'ti.

data.example_1: upasaṅkamitvā paññatte āsane nisīdi
data.example_2: atha kho therā bhikkhū yena bhagavā ten'upasaṅkamiṃsu. upasaṅkamitvā bhagavantaṃ abhivādetvā ekam'antaṃ nisīdiṃsu.

data.meaning_combo: sank emotionally; became disheartened; lit. sank down
data.example_1: yatra hi nāmā'ti yāya jātiyā sati jarā paññāyati, sā jāti dhi'r'atthu dhikkatā atthu, jigucchām'etaṃ jātin'ti, jātiyā mūlaṃ khaṇanto nisīdi, paṭhamena sallena hadaye viddho viya.

data.meaning_1: (singular) a certain; (plural) some; a few; several
data.example_1: app'ekacce bhagavatā saddhiṃ sammodiṃsu, sammodanīyaṃ kathaṃ sāraṇīyaṃ vītisāretvā ekam'antaṃ nisīdiṃsu, app'ekacce yena bhagavā ten'añjaliṃ paṇāmetvā ekam'antaṃ nisīdiṃsu, app'ekacce nāmagottaṃ sāvetvā ekam'antaṃ nisīdiṃsu
data.example_2:
dukkho itthibhāvo,
akkhāto purisadammasārathinā,

data.example_1: evaṃ vutte, uttaro māṇavo pārāsiviy'antevāsī tuṇhībhūto maṅkubhūto pattakkhandho adhomukho pajjhāyanto appaṭibhāno nisīdi.
data.example_2: addasā kho, bhikkhave, kummo kacchapo siṅgālaṃ dūrato'va gocarapasutaṃ. disvāna soṇḍipañcamāni aṅgāni sake kapāle samodahitvā app'ossukko tuṇhībhūto saṅkasāyati.

components.example_1: tatth'āyasmante pucchāmi, kacci'ttha parisuddhā, dutiyam'pi pucchāmi, kacci'ttha parisuddhā, tatiyam'pi pucchāmi, kacci'ttha parisuddhā, parisuddh'etth'āyasmanto, tasmā tuṇhī, evam'etaṃ dhārayāmī'ti.

so bhuttāvī na pattaṃ bhūmiyaṃ nikkhipati n'ātidūre n'āccāsanne, na ca anatthiko pattena hoti, na ca ativel'ānurakkhī pattasmiṃ. so bhuttāvī muhuttaṃ tuṇhī nisīdati, na ca anumodanassa kālam'atināmeti.
yassa siyā āpatti, so āvikareyya, asantiyā āpattiyā tuṇhī bhavitabbaṃ, tuṇhībhāvena kho pan'āyasmante parisuddhā'ti vedissāmi.
components.example_2: evaṃ vutte, bhagavā tuṇhī ahosi

components.example_1: cattāro'me, āvuso, āhārā bhūtānaṃ vā sattānaṃ ṭhitiyā, sambhav'esīnaṃ vā anuggahāya.
components.example_2:
diṭṭhā vā ye ca adiṭṭhā,
ye ca dūre vasanti avidūre
bhūtā vā sambhav'esī vā,
sabbe sattā bhavantu sukhit'attā.

components.meaning_combo: true; correct; genuine; accurate; lit. become
components.example_1: evaṃ no ayaṃ amhākaṃ samaññā ca saccā bhavissati paṭiññā ca bhūtā.
components.example_2: idha, potaliya, ekacco puggalo avaṇṇ'ārahassa avaṇṇaṃ bhāsitā hoti bhūtaṃ tacchaṃ kālena, no ca kho vaṇṇ'ārahassa vaṇṇaṃ bhāsitā hoti bhūtaṃ tacchaṃ kālena.

components.meaning_combo: true; correct; genuine; accurate; lit. become
components.example_1: evaṃ no ayaṃ amhākaṃ samaññā ca saccā bhavissati paṭiññā ca bhūtā.
components.example_2: idha, potaliya, ekacco puggalo avaṇṇ'ārahassa avaṇṇaṃ bhāsitā hoti bhūtaṃ tacchaṃ kālena, no ca kho vaṇṇ'ārahassa vaṇṇaṃ bhāsitā hoti bhūtaṃ tacchaṃ kālena.

components.meaning_combo: being; living being; entity; lit. become
components.example_1:
sukhakāmāni bhūtāni,
yo daṇḍena vihiṃsati,
attano sukham'esāno,
pecca so na labhate sukhaṃ.
components.example_2:
alaṅ'kato ce'pi samaṃ careyya,
santo danto niyato brahmacārī,
sabbesu bhūtesu nidhāya daṇḍaṃ,
so brāhmaṇo so samaṇo sa bhikkhu.

components.example_1:
upādānapaccayā bhavo,
bhūto dukkhaṃ nigacchati,
jātassa maraṇaṃ hoti,
eso dukkhassa sambhavo.
components.example_2: yasmā ca kho, bhikkhave, atthi ajātaṃ abhūtaṃ akataṃ asaṅkhataṃ, tasmā jātassa bhūtassa katassa saṅkhatassa nissaraṇaṃ paññāyetha

components.meaning_combo: state; elemental state; element; lit. become
components.example_1: yato kho, āvuso, bhikkhu catunnaṃ mahābhūtānaṃ samudayañ'ca atthaṅ'gamañ'ca yathābhūtaṃ pajānāti, ettāvatā kho, āvuso, bhikkhuno dassanaṃ suvisuddhaṃ hotī'ti.
components.example_2: katamañ'ca, bhikkhave, rūpaṃ? cattāro ca mahābhūtā, catunnañ'ca mahābhūtānaṃ upādāya rūpaṃ. idaṃ vuccati, bhikkhave, rūpaṃ.

components.example_1: bhūtagāmapātabyatāya pācittiyaṃ.
components.example_2: so bījagāmabhūtagāmasamārambhā paṭivirato hoti

components.meaning_combo: born being; animal; creature; lit. become
components.example_1: atthi balaṃ, atthi vīriyaṃ, atthi purisathāmo, atthi purisaparakkamo, na sabbe sattā sabbe pāṇā sabbe bhūtā sabbe jīvā avasā abalā avīriyā niyatisaṃgatibhāvapariṇatā chasv'ev'ābhijātīsu sukhadukkhaṃ paṭisaṃvedentī'ti.
components.example_2: yam'pi, bhikkhave, mahāsamuddo mahataṃ bhūtānaṃ āvāso, tatr'ime bhūtā, timi timiṅgalo timitimiṅ'galo asurā nāgā gandhabbā

components.meaning_combo: like; as; similar to; lit. become
components.example_1: ayaṃ kho pana, māgaṇḍiya, kāyo rogabhūto gaṇḍabhūto sallabhūto aghabhūto ābādhabhūto, so tvaṃ imaṃ kāyaṃ rogabhūtaṃ gaṇḍabhūtaṃ sallabhūtaṃ aghabhūtaṃ ābādhabhūtaṃ, idan'taṃ, bho gotama, ārogyaṃ, idan'taṃ nibbānan'ti vadesi.

components.meaning_combo: like; as; similar to; lit. become

components.meaning_combo: state; elemental state; element; lit. become
components.example_1: yato kho, āvuso, bhikkhu catunnaṃ mahābhūtānaṃ samudayañ'ca atthaṅ'gamañ'ca yathābhūtaṃ pajānāti, ettāvatā kho, āvuso, bhikkhuno dassanaṃ suvisuddhaṃ hotī'ti.
components.example_2: katamañ'ca, bhikkhave, rūpaṃ? cattāro ca mahābhūtā, catunnañ'ca mahābhūtānaṃ upādāya rūpaṃ. idaṃ vuccati, bhikkhave, rūpaṃ.

components.meaning_combo: born being; animal; creature; lit. become
components.example_1: atthi balaṃ, atthi vīriyaṃ, atthi purisathāmo, atthi purisaparakkamo, na sabbe sattā sabbe pāṇā sabbe bhūtā sabbe jīvā avasā abalā avīriyā niyatisaṃgatibhāvapariṇatā chasv'ev'ābhijātīsu sukhadukkhaṃ paṭisaṃvedentī'ti.
components.example_2: yam'pi, bhikkhave, mahāsamuddo mahataṃ bhūtānaṃ āvāso, tatr'ime bhūtā, timi timiṅgalo timitimiṅ'galo asurā nāgā gandhabbā

components.meaning_combo: like; as; similar to; lit. become
components.example_1: ayaṃ kho pana, māgaṇḍiya, kāyo rogabhūto gaṇḍabhūto sallabhūto aghabhūto ābādhabhūto, so tvaṃ imaṃ kāyaṃ rogabhūtaṃ gaṇḍabhūtaṃ sallabhūtaṃ aghabhūtaṃ ābādhabhūtaṃ, idan'taṃ, bho gotama, ārogyaṃ, idan'taṃ nibbānan'ti vadesi.

data.example_2: addasā kho, bhikkhave, kummo kacchapo siṅgālaṃ dūrato'va gocarapasutaṃ. disvāna soṇḍipañcamāni aṅgāni sake kapāle samodahitvā app'ossukko tuṇhībhūto saṅkasāyati.

so bhuttāvī na pattaṃ bhūmiyaṃ nikkhipati n'ātidūre n'āccāsanne, na ca anatthiko pattena hoti, na ca ativel'ānurakkhī pattasmiṃ. so bhuttāvī muhuttaṃ tuṇhī nisīdati, na ca anumodanassa kālam'atināmeti.

data.meaning_combo: silent; quiet; mute; lit. became silent
data.example_1: evaṃ vutte, uttaro māṇavo pārāsiviy'antevāsī tuṇhībhūto maṅkubhūto pattakkhandho adhomukho pajjhāyanto appaṭibhāno nisīdi.
data.example_2: addasā kho, bhikkhave, kummo kacchapo siṅgālaṃ dūrato'va gocarapasutaṃ. disvāna soṇḍipañcamāni aṅgāni sake kapāle samodahitvā app'ossukko tuṇhībhūto saṅkasāyati.

components.example_1: tatth'āyasmante pucchāmi, kacci'ttha parisuddhā, dutiyam'pi pucchāmi, kacci'ttha parisuddhā, tatiyam'pi pucchāmi, kacci'ttha parisuddhā, parisuddh'etth'āyasmanto, tasmā tuṇhī, evam'etaṃ dhārayāmī'ti.

so bhuttāvī na pattaṃ bhūmiyaṃ nikkhipati n'ātidūre n'āccāsanne, na ca anatthiko pattena hoti, na ca ativel'ānurakkhī pattasmiṃ. so bhuttāvī muhuttaṃ tuṇhī nisīdati, na ca anumodanassa kālam'atināmeti.
yassa siyā āpatti, so āvikareyya, asantiyā āpattiyā tuṇhī bhavitabbaṃ, tuṇhībhāvena kho pan'āyasmante parisuddhā'ti vedissāmi.
components.example_2: evaṃ vutte, bhagavā tuṇhī ahosi

components.example_1: cattāro'me, āvuso, āhārā bhūtānaṃ vā sattānaṃ ṭhitiyā, sambhav'esīnaṃ vā anuggahāya.

sabbe sattā bhavantu sukhit'attā.
