components.example_1: atthi balaṃ, atthi vīriyaṃ, atthi purisathāmo, atthi purisaparakkamo, na sabbe sattā sabbe pāṇā sabbe bhūtā sabbe jīvā avasā abalā avīriyā niyatisaṃgatibhāvapariṇatā chasv'ev'ābhijātīsu sukhadukkhaṃ paṭisaṃvedentī'ti.
components.example_2: yam'pi, bhikkhave, mahāsamuddo mahataṃ bhūtānaṃ āvāso, tatr'ime bhūtā, timi timiṅgalo timitimiṅ'galo asurā nāgā gandhabbā

components.meaning_combo: like; as; similar to; lit. become
components.example_1: ayaṃ kho pana, māgaṇḍiya, kāyo rogabhūto gaṇḍabhūto sallabhūto aghabhūto ābādhabhūto, so tvaṃ imaṃ kāyaṃ rogabhūtaṃ gaṇḍabhūtaṃ sallabhūtaṃ aghabhūtaṃ ābādhabhūtaṃ, idan'taṃ, bho gotama, ārogyaṃ, idan'taṃ nibbānan'ti vadesi.

components.meaning_combo: like; as; similar to; lit. become
components.example_1: ayaṃ kho pana, māgaṇḍiya, kāyo rogabhūto gaṇḍabhūto sallabhūto aghabhūto ābādhabhūto, so tvaṃ imaṃ kāyaṃ rogabhūtaṃ gaṇḍabhūtaṃ sallabhūtaṃ aghabhūtaṃ ābādhabhūtaṃ, idan'taṃ, bho gotama, ārogyaṃ, idan'taṃ nibbānan'ti vadesi.

components.meaning_combo: name of an arahant monk; lit. become
being; fact of being; lit. become

data.grammar: ind, adv, comp, acc sg of ekamanta
data.example_1: atha kho bhagavā kumbhakār'āvesanaṃ pavisitvā ekam'antaṃ tiṇasanthārakaṃ paññāpetvā nisīdi pallaṅkaṃ ābhujitvā ujuṃ kāyaṃ paṇidhāya parimukhaṃ satiṃ upaṭṭhapetvā.
data.example_2: tena kho pana samayena kasibhāradvājassa brāhmaṇassa parivesanā vattati. atha kho bhagavā yena parivesanā ten'upasaṅkami, upasaṅkamitvā ekam'antaṃ aṭṭhāsi.

components.example_1: seyyathā'pi, bhikkhave, mahāsamuddo ekaraso loṇaraso, evam'eva kho, bhikkhave, ayaṃ dhammavinayo ekaraso vimuttiraso
components.example_2:
yo ca gāthā sataṃ bhāse,
anatthapadasaṃhitā,
ekaṃ dhammapadaṃ seyyo,
yaṃ sutvā upasammati.

components.example_1:
yo ca vassasataṃ jantu,
aggiṃ paricare vane,
ekañ'ca bhāvit'attānaṃ,
muhuttam'api pūjaye,
sā'y'eva pūjanā seyyo,
yañ'ce vassasataṃ hutaṃ.
components.example_2: atīte kira kassapasammāsambuddhakāle gāmavāsī eko kuṭumbiko ekassa therassa vihāraṃ katvā taṃ tattha viharantaṃ catūhi paccayehi upaṭṭhahi

components.example_1:
supupphit'aggaṃ upagamma bhikkhuni,
ekā tuvaṃ tiṭṭhasi sālamūle,
na c'atthi te dutiyā vaṇṇadhātu,
bāle na tvaṃ bhāyasi dhuttakānan'ti.
components.example_2: so eko gāmaṃ piṇḍāya pavisati eko paṭikkamati eko raho nisīdati eko caṅkamaṃ adhiṭṭhāti.

components.example_1: tesam'assa ekaputtako piyo manāpo
components.example_2:
mātā yathā niyaṃ puttaṃ āyusā ekaputtam'anurakkhe, 
evam'pi sabbabhūtesu,
mānasam'bhāvaye aparimāṇaṃ.

components.example_1: yo pana bhikkhu bhikkhuniyā saddhiṃ saṃvidhāya ek'addhānamaggaṃ paṭipajjeyya antamaso gām'antaram'pi aññatra samayā, pācittiyaṃ. tatth'āyaṃ samayo, satthagamanīyo hoti maggo, sāsaṅkasammato, sappaṭibhayo, ayaṃ tattha samayo.
components.example_2: yo pana bhikkhu bhikkhuniyā saddhiṃ saṃvidhāya ekaṃ nāvaṃ abhiruheyya uddhaṃgāminiṃ vā adhogāminiṃ vā aññatra tiriyaṃ taraṇāya, pācittiyaṃ.

components.meaning_1: one thing; single thing; a certain thing
components.meaning_combo: one thing; single thing; a certain thing
components.example_1: ye āsavā saṃkilesikā ponobbhavikā sadarā dukkhavipākā āyatiṃ jātijarāmaraṇiyā, appahīnā te tathāgatassa, tasmā tathāgato saṅkhāy'ekaṃ paṭisevati, saṅkhāy'ekaṃ adhivāseti, saṅkhāy'ekaṃ parivajjeti, saṅkhāy'ekaṃ vinodetī'ti?
yattha nu kho, bhante, na jāyati na jīyati na mīyati na cavati na upapajjati, sakkā nu kho so, bhante, gamanena lokassa anto ñātuṃ vā daṭṭhuṃ vā pāpuṇituṃ vā'ti?
components.example_2:
es'ūpamā dāmali brāhmaṇassa,
khīṇ'āsavassa nipakassa jhāyino,
pappuyya jātimaraṇassa antaṃ,
n'āyūhatī pāragato hi so'ti.

components.example_1:
ubhosu antesu vineyya chandaṃ,
phassaṃ pariññāya anānugiddho,
yadattagarahī tadakubbamāno,
na lippatī diṭṭhasutesu dhīro.
components.example_2: evaṃ vutte aññataro bhikkhu there bhikkhū etadavoca, phasso kho, āvuso, eko anto, phassasamudayo dutiyo anto, phassanirodho majjhe, taṇhā sibbinī.

components.meaning_1: ending up as; finishing in; resulting in
components.meaning_combo: ending up as; finishing in; resulting in
components.example_1: kāpotakāni aṭṭhīni bhavanti. bhass'antā āhutiyo, dattupaññattaṃ yadidaṃ dānaṃ. tesaṃ tucchā musā vilāpo ye keci atthikavādaṃ vadanti.
atthi imasmiṃ kāye… antaṃ antaguṇaṃ udariyaṃ karīsaṃ (matthaluṅgaṃ), pittaṃ semhaṃ pubbo lohitaṃ sedo medo, assu vasā kheḷo siṅghāṇikā lasikā muttan'ti.
components.example_2: atha kho so, bhikkhave, mudumūsi gocarāya pakkāmi. tam'enaṃ biḷāro gahetvā sahasā saṅkhāditvā ajjhohari. tassa so mudumūsi antam'pi khādi, antaguṇam'pi khādi.

components.example_1: sañcetanikā sukkavissaṭṭhi aññatra supin'antā saṅgh'ādiseso.
components.example_2: evaṃ, bhante. sace so, bhikkhave, dārukkhandho na orimaṃ tīraṃ upagacchati, na pārimaṃ tīraṃ upagacchati, na majjhe saṃsīdissati, na thale ussīdissati, na manussaggāho gahessati, na amanussaggāho gahessati, na āvaṭṭaggāho gahessati, na antopūti bhavissati, evañ'hi so, bhikkhave, dārukkhandho samuddaninno bhavissati samuddapoṇo samuddapabbhāro. taṃ kissa hetu?

components.meaning_combo: the worst; the lowest (of); lit. end
components.example_1: antam'idaṃ, bhikkhave, jīvikānaṃ yadidaṃ piṇḍolyaṃ. abhisāpo'yaṃ, bhikkhave, lokasmiṃ, piṇḍolo vicarasi pattapāṇī'ti.

data.example_1: upasaṅkamitvā paññatte āsane nisīdi
data.example_2: atha kho therā bhikkhū yena bhagavā ten'upasaṅkamiṃsu. upasaṅkamitvā bhagavantaṃ abhivādetvā ekam'antaṃ nisīdiṃsu.

data.meaning_combo: sank emotionally; became disheartened; lit. sank down
data.example_1: yatra hi nāmā'ti yāya jātiyā sati jarā paññāyati, sā jāti dhi'r'atthu dhikkatā atthu, jigucchām'etaṃ jātin'ti, jātiyā mūlaṃ khaṇanto nisīdi, paṭhamena sallena hadaye viddho viya.

n'āyūhatī pāragato hi so'ti.

components.example_1:
ubhosu antesu vineyya chandaṃ,
phassaṃ pariññāya anānugiddho,
yadattagarahī tadakubbamāno,
na lippatī diṭṭhasutesu dhīro.
components.example_2: evaṃ vutte aññataro bhikkhu there bhikkhū etadavoca, phasso kho, āvuso, eko anto, phassasamudayo dutiyo anto, phassanirodho majjhe, taṇhā sibbinī.

components.meaning_1: ending up as; finishing in; resulting in
components.meaning_combo: ending up as; finishing in; resulting in
components.example_1: kāpotakāni aṭṭhīni bhavanti. bhass'antā āhutiyo, dattupaññattaṃ yadidaṃ dānaṃ. tesaṃ tucchā musā vilāpo ye keci atthikavādaṃ vadanti.
atthi imasmiṃ kāye… antaṃ antaguṇaṃ udariyaṃ karīsaṃ (matthaluṅgaṃ), pittaṃ semhaṃ pubbo lohitaṃ sedo medo, assu vasā kheḷo siṅghāṇikā lasikā muttan'ti.
components.example_2: atha kho so, bhikkhave, mudumūsi gocarāya pakkāmi. tam'enaṃ biḷāro gahetvā sahasā saṅkhāditvā ajjhohari. tassa so mudumūsi antam'pi khādi, antaguṇam'pi khādi.

components.example_1: sañcetanikā sukkavissaṭṭhi aññatra supin'antā saṅgh'ādiseso.
components.example_2: evaṃ, bhante. sace so, bhikkhave, dārukkhandho na orimaṃ tīraṃ upagacchati, na pārimaṃ tīraṃ upagacchati, na majjhe saṃsīdissati, na thale ussīdissati, na manussaggāho gahessati, na amanussaggāho gahessati, na āvaṭṭaggāho gahessati, na antopūti bhavissati, evañ'hi so, bhikkhave, dārukkhandho samuddaninno bhavissati samuddapoṇo samuddapabbhāro. taṃ kissa hetu?

components.meaning_combo: the worst; the lowest (of); lit. end
components.example_1: antam'idaṃ, bhikkhave, jīvikānaṃ yadidaṃ piṇḍolyaṃ. abhisāpo'yaṃ, bhikkhave, lokasmiṃ, piṇḍolo vicarasi pattapāṇī'ti.

data.meaning_1: from the town of Sālā; living in Sālā
data.example_1: assosuṃ kho sāleyyakā brāhmaṇagahapatikā, samaṇo khalu, bho, gotamo sakyaputto sakyakulā pabbajito kosalesu cārikaṃ caramāno mahatā bhikkhusaṅghena saddhiṃ sālaṃ anuppatto.
data.example_2: evaṃ vutte, sāleyyakā brāhmaṇagahapatikā bhagavantaṃ etadavocuṃ, abhikkantaṃ, bho gotama, abhikkantaṃ, bho gotama!

data.example_1: brāhmaṇagahapatikānam'pi tasmiṃ samaye na phāsu hoti atiyātuṃ vā niyyātuṃ vā bāhirāni vā kamm'antāni paṭivekkhituṃ.
data.example_2: assosuṃ kho mithileyyakā brāhmaṇagahapatikā, samaṇo khalu, bho, gotamo sakyaputto sakyakulā pabbajito videhesu cārikaṃ caramāno mahatā bhikkhusaṅghena saddhiṃ pañcamattehi bhikkhusatehi mithilaṃ anuppatto

components.meaning_1: Brahman; priest; man of the Brahman caste
components.example_1:
na jaccā vasalo hoti,
na jaccā hoti brāhmaṇo,
kammunā vasalo hoti,
kammunā hoti brāhmaṇo'ti.
components.example_2: imāni cattāri ariyasaccānī'ti, bhikkhave, mayā dhammo desito aniggahito asaṃkiliṭṭho anupavajjo appaṭikuṭṭho samaṇehi brāhmaṇehi viññūhī'ti. iti yaṃ taṃ vuttaṃ idam'etaṃ paṭicca vuttan'ti.

components.example_1:
tass'īdha diṭṭhe va sute mute vā,
pakappitā n'atthi aṇū'pi saññā,
taṃ brāhmaṇaṃ diṭṭhim'anādiyānaṃ,
ken'īdha lokasmiṃ vikappayeyya.
components.example_2: aham'asmi, bhikkhave, brāhmaṇo yācayogo sadā payatapāṇi antimadehadharo anuttaro bhisakko sallakatto.

components.example_1:
chinda sotaṃ parakkamma,
kāme panuda brāhmaṇa,
saṅkhārānaṃ khayaṃ ñatvā,
akataññū'si brāhmaṇa.
components.example_2:
divā tapati ādicco,
rattim'ābhāti candimā,
sannaddho khattiyo tapati,
jhāyī tapati brāhmaṇo,
atha sabbam'ahorattiṃ,
buddho tapati tejasā.

components.example_1:
sāleyya verañjaduve ca tuṭṭhi,
cūḷamahādhammasamādānañ'ca,
vīmaṃsakā kosambi ca brāhmaṇo,
dūsī ca māro dasamo ca vaggo.
yam'pi no saddhā gahapatikā divā vikāle paṇītaṃ khādanīyaṃ vā bhojanīyaṃ vā denti, tatra'p'ime mukh'āvaraṇaṃ maññe karontī'ti.
components.example_2: ko nu kho bho kaccāna hetu ko paccayo yena khattiyā'pi khattiyehi vivadanti brāhmaṇā'pi brāhmaṇehi vivadanti gahapatikā'pi gahapatikehi vivadantī'ti?

components.meaning_combo: grip; grabbing; seizing; holding; lit. what is grasped
components.example_1:
n'atthi rāgasamo aggi,
n'atthi dosasamo gaho,
n'atthi mohasamaṃ jālaṃ,
n'atthi taṇhāsamā nadī.
components.example_2:
idaṃ pure cittam'acāri cārikaṃ,
yen'icchakaṃ yatthakāmaṃ yathāsukhaṃ,
tadajj'ahaṃ niggahessāmi yoniso,
hatthippabhinnaṃ viya aṅkusaggaho.

components.example_1:
gahakāraka diṭṭho'si,
puna gehaṃ na kāhasi,
sabbā te phāsukā bhaggā,
gahakūṭaṃ visaṅkhataṃ,
visaṅkhāragataṃ cittaṃ,
taṇhānaṃ khayamajjhagā.
components.example_2: gahapati vā gahapatiputto vā aññatarasmiṃ vā kule paccājāto.

components.meaning_combo: household life; laylife; lit. what is grasped
components.example_1:
nam'atthi ūnaṃ kāmehi,
hiṃsitā me na vijjati,
amanussavaco sutvā,
tasm'āhaṃ na gahe rame.
components.example_2:
so'haṃ tam'ev'ānuvicintayanto,
eko sayāmi sayanassa majjhe,
aham'pi evaṃ iti pekkhamāno,
na gahe rame brahmacariyassa kālo.

components.example_1:
khippaṃ assamam'āgantvā,
madhutelaṃ gahiṃ ahaṃ,
kolambakaṃ gahetvāna,
upagacchiṃ vināyakaṃ.
bodhisattassa vacanaṃ sutvā seṭṭhi kampamāno dhanasokena satiṃ paccupaṭṭhāpetuṃ asakkonto tatth'eva pati

so puṇṇako kāmavegena giddho,
irandhatiṃ nāgakaññaṃ jigiṃsaṃ,
gantvāna taṃ bhūtapatiṃ yasassiṃ,
icc'abravī vessavaṇaṃ kuveraṃ.
components.example_2: gahapati vā gahapatiputto vā aññatarasmiṃ vā kule paccājāto.

components.example_1:
sumuttā sādhumutt'āmhi,
tīhi khujjehi muttiyā,
udukkhalena musalena,
patinā khujjakena ca,
mutt'āmhi jātimaraṇā,
bhavanetti samūhatā'ti.
components.example_2:
patīsu dhammaṃ pacarāma sabbā,
patibbatā yattha bhavanti itthiyo,
patīsu dhammaṃ pacaritva sabbā,
lacchāmase bhāsati yaṃ ayaṃ latā.

components.example_1:
tato ratyā vivasāne,
sūriyass'uggamanaṃ pati,
sabbaṃ taṇhaṃ visosetvā,
pallaṅkena upāvisin'ti.

so aham'pi gamissāmi,
nagaraṃ mithilaṃ pati,
app'eva maṃ so bhagavā,
sabbadukkhā pamocaye.
components.example_2:
eso hi bhagavā buddho,
nadiṃ nerañjaraṃ pati,
sabbadukkhappahānāya,
dhammaṃ deseti pāṇinaṃ,
tass'āhaṃ santikaṃ gacchaṃ,
so me satthā bhavissati.

components.example_1:
saṇhatuṅgasadisī ca nāsikā,
sobhate su abhiyobbanaṃ pati,
sā jarāya upakūlitā viya,
saccavādivacanaṃ anaññathā.

ekam'antaṃ nisinnaṃ kho āyasmantaṃ mahākassapaṃ bhagavā etadavoca, jiṇṇo'si dāni tvaṃ, kassapa, garukāni ca te imāni sāṇāni paṃsukūlāni nibbasanāni. tasmā't'iha tvaṃ, kassapa, gahapatikāni c'eva cīvarāni dhārehi, nimantanāni ca bhuñjāhi, mama ca santike viharāhī'ti.

components.meaning_combo: grip; grabbing; seizing; holding; lit. what is grasped
components.example_1:
n'atthi rāgasamo aggi,
n'atthi dosasamo gaho,
n'atthi mohasamaṃ jālaṃ,
n'atthi taṇhāsamā nadī.
components.example_2:
idaṃ pure cittam'acāri cārikaṃ,
yen'icchakaṃ yatthakāmaṃ yathāsukhaṃ,
tadajj'ahaṃ niggahessāmi yoniso,
hatthippabhinnaṃ viya aṅkusaggaho.

components.example_1:
gahakāraka diṭṭho'si,
puna gehaṃ na kāhasi,
sabbā te phāsukā bhaggā,
gahakūṭaṃ visaṅkhataṃ,
visaṅkhāragataṃ cittaṃ,
taṇhānaṃ khayamajjhagā.
components.example_2: gahapati vā gahapatiputto vā aññatarasmiṃ vā kule paccājāto.

components.meaning_combo: household life; laylife; lit. what is grasped
components.example_1:
nam'atthi ūnaṃ kāmehi,
hiṃsitā me na vijjati,
amanussavaco sutvā,
tasm'āhaṃ na gahe rame.
components.example_2:
so'haṃ tam'ev'ānuvicintayanto,
eko sayāmi sayanassa majjhe,
aham'pi evaṃ iti pekkhamāno,
na gahe rame brahmacariyassa kālo.

components.example_1:
khippaṃ assamam'āgantvā,
madhutelaṃ gahiṃ ahaṃ,
kolambakaṃ gahetvāna,
upagacchiṃ vināyakaṃ.
bodhisattassa vacanaṃ sutvā seṭṭhi kampamāno dhanasokena satiṃ paccupaṭṭhāpetuṃ asakkonto tatth'eva pati

so puṇṇako kāmavegena giddho,
irandhatiṃ nāgakaññaṃ jigiṃsaṃ,
gantvāna taṃ bhūtapatiṃ yasassiṃ,
icc'abravī vessavaṇaṃ kuveraṃ.
components.example_2: gahapati vā gahapatiputto vā aññatarasmiṃ vā kule paccājāto.

components.example_1:
sumuttā sādhumutt'āmhi,
tīhi khujjehi muttiyā,
udukkhalena musalena,
patinā khujjakena ca,
mutt'āmhi jātimaraṇā,
bhavanetti samūhatā'ti.
components.example_2:
patīsu dhammaṃ pacarāma sabbā,
patibbatā yattha bhavanti itthiyo,
patīsu dhammaṃ pacaritva sabbā,
lacchāmase bhāsati yaṃ ayaṃ latā.

components.example_1:
tato ratyā vivasāne,
sūriyass'uggamanaṃ pati,
sabbaṃ taṇhaṃ visosetvā,
pallaṅkena upāvisin'ti.

so aham'pi gamissāmi,
nagaraṃ mithilaṃ pati,
app'eva maṃ so bhagavā,
sabbadukkhā pamocaye.
components.example_2:
eso hi bhagavā buddho,
nadiṃ nerañjaraṃ pati,
sabbadukkhappahānāya,
dhammaṃ deseti pāṇinaṃ,
tass'āhaṃ santikaṃ gacchaṃ,
so me satthā bhavissati.

components.example_1:
saṇhatuṅgasadisī ca nāsikā,
sobhate su abhiyobbanaṃ pati,
sā jarāya upakūlitā viya,
saccavādivacanaṃ anaññathā.

data.example_1: brāhmaṇagahapatikānam'pi tasmiṃ samaye na phāsu hoti atiyātuṃ vā niyyātuṃ vā bāhirāni vā kamm'antāni paṭivekkhituṃ.
data.example_2: assosuṃ kho mithileyyakā brāhmaṇagahapatikā, samaṇo khalu, bho, gotamo sakyaputto sakyakulā pabbajito videhesu cārikaṃ caramāno mahatā bhikkhusaṅghena saddhiṃ pañcamattehi bhikkhusatehi mithilaṃ anuppatto

components.meaning_1: Brahman; priest; man of the Brahman caste
components.example_1:
na jaccā vasalo hoti,
na jaccā hoti brāhmaṇo,
kammunā vasalo hoti,
kammunā hoti brāhmaṇo'ti.
components.example_2: imāni cattāri ariyasaccānī'ti, bhikkhave, mayā dhammo desito aniggahito asaṃkiliṭṭho anupavajjo appaṭikuṭṭho samaṇehi brāhmaṇehi viññūhī'ti. iti yaṃ taṃ vuttaṃ idam'etaṃ paṭicca vuttan'ti.

components.example_1:
tass'īdha diṭṭhe va sute mute vā,
pakappitā n'atthi aṇū'pi saññā,
taṃ brāhmaṇaṃ diṭṭhim'anādiyānaṃ,
ken'īdha lokasmiṃ vikappayeyya.
components.example_2: aham'asmi, bhikkhave, brāhmaṇo yācayogo sadā payatapāṇi antimadehadharo anuttaro bhisakko sallakatto.

components.example_1:
chinda sotaṃ parakkamma,
kāme panuda brāhmaṇa,
saṅkhārānaṃ khayaṃ ñatvā,
akataññū'si brāhmaṇa.
components.example_2:
divā tapati ādicco,
rattim'ābhāti candimā,
sannaddho khattiyo tapati,
jhāyī tapati brāhmaṇo,
atha sabbam'ahorattiṃ,
buddho tapati tejasā.

components.example_1:
sāleyya verañjaduve ca tuṭṭhi,
cūḷamahādhammasamādānañ'ca,
vīmaṃsakā kosambi ca brāhmaṇo,
dūsī ca māro dasamo ca vaggo.
yam'pi no saddhā gahapatikā divā vikāle paṇītaṃ khādanīyaṃ vā bhojanīyaṃ vā denti, tatra'p'ime mukh'āvaraṇaṃ maññe karontī'ti.
components.example_2: ko nu kho bho kaccāna hetu ko paccayo yena khattiyā'pi khattiyehi vivadanti brāhmaṇā'pi brāhmaṇehi vivadanti gahapatikā'pi gahapatikehi vivadantī'ti?

data.meaning_1: Sublime One; Blessed One; Fortunate One; Auspicious One; epithet of the Buddha
data.example_1:
anejaṃ mūladassāviṃ,
atthi pañhena āgamaṃ,
kiṃ nissitā isayo manujā,
khattiyā brāhmaṇā devatānaṃ,
yaññam'akappayiṃsu puthū'dha loke,
pucchāmi taṃ bhagavā brūhi me taṃ.
data.example_2: bhagavaṃmūlakā no, bhante, dhammā bhagavaṃnettikā bhagavaṃpaṭisaraṇā. sādhu vata, bhante, bhagavantaṃ'y'eva paṭibhātu etassa bhāsitassa attho. bhagavato sutvā bhikkhū dhāressantī'ti.

data.example_1: evaṃ vutte aññataro bhikkhu there bhikkhū etadavoca, phasso kho, āvuso, eko anto, phassasamudayo dutiyo anto, phassanirodho majjhe, taṇhā sibbinī.
data.example_2: idh'āhaṃ, bhante, yen'aññataro bhikkhu ten'upasaṅkamiṃ, upasaṅkamitvā taṃ bhikkhuṃ etadavocaṃ, kittāvatā nu kho, āvuso, bhikkhuno dassanaṃ suvisuddhaṃ hotī'ti?

components.example_1: dūrato'pi kho mayaṃ, āvuso, āgaccheyyāma āyasmato sāriputtassa santike etassa bhāsitassa attham'aññātuṃ
components.example_2:
accenti kālā tarayanti rattiyo,
vayoguṇā anupubbaṃ jahanti,
etaṃ bhayaṃ maraṇe pekkhamāno,
puññāni kayirātha sukh'āvahānī'ti.

mā-avoca pharusaṃ kañci,
vuttā paṭivadeyyu taṃ,
dukkhā hi sārambhakathā,
paṭidaṇḍā phuseyyu taṃ.
components.example_2: evaṃ vutte, āyasmā moḷiyaphagguno bhagavantaṃ etadavoca, ko nu kho, bhante, viññāṇ'āhāraṃ āhāretī'ti? no kallo pañho'ti bhagavā avoca, āhāretī'ti ahaṃ na vadāmi.

data.example_1: avijjam'p'āhaṃ, bhikkhave, sāhāraṃ vadāmi, no anāhāraṃ. ko c'āhāro avijjāya?
data.example_2:
ko sujjhati muccati bajjhatī ca,
ken'attanā gacchati brahmalokaṃ,
ajānato me muni brūhi puṭṭho,
bhagavā hi me sakkhi brahmajjadiṭṭho,
tuvañ'hi no brahmasamo'si saccaṃ,
kathaṃ upapajjati brahmalokaṃ jutima.

data.example_1: ekam'antaṃ nisinnā kho te bhikkhū bhagavantaṃ etadavocuṃ, yo so, bhante, pukkusāti nāma kulaputto bhagavatā saṃkhittena ovādena ovadito so kālaṅ'kato. tassa kā gati, ko abhisamparāyo'ti?

data.example_1: yo'pi hetu yo'pi paccayo cakkhuviññāṇassa uppādāya, so'pi hetu so'pi paccayo anicco vipariṇāmī aññathābhāvī. aniccaṃ kho pana, bhikkhave, paccayaṃ paṭicca uppannaṃ cakkhuviññāṇaṃ kuto niccaṃ bhavissati!
data.example_2: aṭṭh'ime, bhikkhave, hetū aṭṭha paccayā ādibrahmacariyikāya paññāya appaṭiladdhāya paṭilābhāya, paṭiladdhāya bhiyyobhāvāya vepullāya bhāvanāya pāripūriyā saṃvattanti. katame aṭṭha?

data.meaning_1: for; for the purpose; for the sake (of)
data.meaning_combo: for; for the purpose; for the sake (of); lit. reason
data.example_1: iti attahetu vā parahetu vā āmisakiñcikkhahetu vā na sampajānamusā bhāsitā hoti.
data.example_2: varaṃ te, bhikkhu, tiṇhena govikantanena kucchi parikanto, na tv'eva varaṃ yaṃ ratt'andhakāratimisāyaṃ kucchihetu piṇḍāya carasī'ti.

data.example_1: avijjam'p'āhaṃ, bhikkhave, sāhāraṃ vadāmi, no anāhāraṃ. ko c'āhāro avijjāya?
data.example_2:
ko sujjhati muccati bajjhatī ca,
ken'attanā gacchati brahmalokaṃ,
ajānato me muni brūhi puṭṭho,
bhagavā hi me sakkhi brahmajjadiṭṭho,
tuvañ'hi no brahmasamo'si saccaṃ,
kathaṃ upapajjati brahmalokaṃ jutima.

data.example_1: ekam'antaṃ nisinnā kho te bhikkhū bhagavantaṃ etadavocuṃ, yo so, bhante, pukkusāti nāma kulaputto bhagavatā saṃkhittena ovādena ovadito so kālaṅ'kato. tassa kā gati, ko abhisamparāyo'ti?

kiṃ sundarikā karissati,
kiṃ payāgo kiṃ bāhukā nadī,
veriṃ katakibbisaṃ naraṃ,
na hi naṃ sodhaye pāpakamminaṃ.
data.example_2:
ky'āssa byappathayo assu,
ky'āss'assu idha gocarā,
kāni sīlabbatān'āssu,
pahit'attassa bhikkhuno.

data.example_1: agilānena bhikkhunā catumāsappaccayapavāraṇā sāditabbā aññatra punapavāraṇāya, aññatra niccapavāraṇāya. tato ce uttari sādiyeyya, pācittiyaṃ.
data.example_2: cīvara-piṇḍapāta-sen'āsana-gilānappaccaya-bhesajja-parikkhāraṃ

data.example_1: avijjāpaccayā saṅkhārā, saṅkhārapaccayā viññāṇaṃ, viññāṇapaccayā nāmarūpaṃ
data.example_2:
yassa darathajā na santi keci,
oraṃ āgamanāya paccayāse,
so bhikkhu jahāti orapāraṃ,
urago jiṇṇam'iva tacaṃ purāṇaṃ.

data.example_1: atha kho upāli gahapati diṭṭhadhammo pattadhammo viditadhammo pariyogāḷhadhammo tiṇṇavicikiccho vigatakathaṃkatho vesārajjappatto aparappaccayo satthusāsane bhagavantaṃ etadavoca, handa ca dāni mayaṃ, bhante, gacchāma, bahukiccā mayaṃ bahukaraṇīyā'ti.

data.meaning_combo: name of an arahant monk; lit. dependent

data.example_1: yadā arogā ahosi tadā yaṃ iccheyyāsi taṃ dajjeyyāsī'ti
data.example_2:
so bajjhataṃ pāsasatehi chabbhi,
rammā vanā niyyatu rājadhāniṃ,
tuttehi so haññatu pācanehi,
bhisāni te brāhmaṇa yo ahāsi.

data.grammar: ind, adv, instr sg of ya
data.example_1:
na tena thero so hoti,
yena-assa palitaṃ siro,
paripakko vayo tassa,
moghajiṇṇo'ti vuccati.
data.example_2: ko nu kho bho kaccāna hetu ko paccayo yena khattiyā'pi khattiyehi vivadanti brāhmaṇā'pi brāhmaṇehi vivadanti gahapatikā'pi gahapatikehi vivadantī'ti?

data.grammar: ind, adv, instr sg of ya
data.meaning_1: where; wherever; in which direction; to; towards
data.example_1: atha kho āyasmā ānando pubb'aṇhasamayaṃ nivāsetvā pattacīvaram'ādāya yena aññataro bhikkhun'upassayo ten'upasaṅkami
data.example_2: siṅgālo'pi kho, bhikkhave, addasa kummaṃ kacchapaṃ dūrato'va gocarapasutaṃ. disvāna yena kummo kacchapo ten'upasaṅkami.

data.example_1: atha kho āyasmā ānando uttiyaṃ paribbājakaṃ etadavoca, tenah'āvuso uttiya, upamaṃ te karissāmi. upamāya m'idh'ekacce viññū purisā bhāsitassa atthaṃ ājānanti.

data.example_1:
anicce niccasaññino,
dukkhe ca sukhasaññino,
anattani ca attā'ti,
asubhe subhasaññino,
micchādiṭṭhihatā sattā,
khittacittā visaññino.
data.example_2: evam'eva kho, bhikkhave, appakā te sattā ye manussesu paccājāyanti. atha kho ete'y'eva bahutarā sattā ye aññatra manussehi paccājāyanti.

data.example_1:
hitvā icchañ'ca lobhañ'ca,
yattha satto puthujjano,
cakkhumā paṭipajjeyya,
tareyya narakaṃ imaṃ.
data.example_2:
satto guhāyaṃ bahun'ābhichanno,
tiṭṭhaṃ naro mohanasmiṃ pagāḷho,
dūre vivekā hi tathāvidho so,
kāmā hi loke na hi suppahāyā.

data.example_1:
akkhambhiyo hoti agāram'āvasaṃ,
par'ābhibhū sattubhi nappamaddano,
manussabhūten'idha hoti kenaci,
akkhambhiyo tassa phalena kammuno.
data.example_2:
idaṃ kho'haṃ tadāvocaṃ,
gahitā tena sattunā,
na me idaṃ tathā dukkhaṃ,
yaṃ maṃ khādeyya rakkhaso,
yañ'ca me ayyaputtassa,
mano hessati aññathā.

data.meaning_combo: body; physical body; physical process; lit. accumulation
data.example_1: yāv'assa kāyo ṭhassati tāva naṃ dakkhanti devamanussā kāyassa bhedā uddhaṃ jīvitapariyādānā na naṃ dakkhanti devamanussā'ti
data.example_2: tassa sabbehi imehi pāpakehi akusalehi dhammehi visuddham'attānaṃ samanupassato, vimuttam'attānaṃ samanupassato, pāmojjaṃ jāyati, pamuditassa pīti jāyati, pītimanassa kāyo passambhati, passaddhakāyo sukhaṃ vedeti, sukhino cittaṃ samādhiyati.

data.example_2: tassa sabbehi imehi pāpakehi akusalehi dhammehi visuddham'attānaṃ samanupassato, vimuttam'attānaṃ samanupassato, pāmojjaṃ jāyati, pamuditassa pīti jāyati, pītimanassa kāyo passambhati, passaddhakāyo sukhaṃ vedeti, sukhino cittaṃ samādhiyati.

data.meaning_1: group; host; company; collection; multitude; mass

data.example_1: tena sudaṃ, bhante, devatā tāvatiṃsā attamanā honti pamuditā pītisomanassajātā dibbā vata bho kāyā paripūrenti, hāyanti asurakāyā'ti
data.example_2:
mahāsamayo pavanasmiṃ,
devakāyā samāgatā,
āgat'amha imaṃ dhammasamayaṃ,
dakkhitāye aparājitasaṅghan'ti.

data.example_1: sabbakāyapaṭisaṃvedī assasissāmī'ti sikkhati, sabbakāyapaṭisaṃvedī passasissāmī'ti sikkhati. passambhayaṃ kāyasaṅkhāraṃ assasissāmī'ti sikkhati, passambhayaṃ kāyasaṅkhāraṃ passasissāmī'ti sikkhati
data.example_2: kāyesu kāy'aññatar'āhaṃ, bhikkhave, evaṃ vadāmi yadidaṃ, assāsapassāsā. tasmā't'iha, bhikkhave, kāye kāy'ānupassī tasmiṃ samaye bhikkhu viharati ātāpī sampajāno satimā vineyya loke abhijjhādomanassaṃ.

data.example_1: sabbakāyapaṭisaṃvedī assasissāmī'ti sikkhati, sabbakāyapaṭisaṃvedī passasissāmī'ti sikkhati. passambhayaṃ kāyasaṅkhāraṃ assasissāmī'ti sikkhati, passambhayaṃ kāyasaṅkhāraṃ passasissāmī'ti sikkhati

data.example_1: katamā ca, bhikkhave, taṇhā? cha'y'ime, bhikkhave, taṇhākāyā, rūpataṇhā, saddataṇhā, gandhataṇhā, rasataṇhā, phoṭṭhabbataṇhā, dhammataṇhā. ayaṃ vuccati, bhikkhave, taṇhā.
data.example_2: cha'y'ime, bhikkhave, vedanākāyā, cakkhusamphassajā vedanā, sotasamphassajā vedanā, ghānasamphassajā vedanā, kāyasamphassajā vedanā, manosamphassajā vedanā.

data.meaning_combo: physical existence; material existence; lit. accumulation
data.example_1: pañcahi, bhikkhave, vaḍḍhīhi vaḍḍhamānā ariyasāvikā ariyāya vaḍḍhiyā vaḍḍhati sār'ādāyinī ca hoti var'ādāyinī ca kāyassa. katamehi pañcahi?
data.example_2: ahesuṃ kho ye, bhikkhu, tayā pubbe samaṇabrāhmaṇā lokasmiṃ pathavīgarahakā pathavījigucchakā… te kāyassa bhedā pāṇ'upacchedā hīne kāye patiṭṭhitā ahesuṃ.

data.meaning_1: group of beings; class of beings; state of existence
data.meaning_combo: group of beings; class of beings; state of existence; lit. accumulation
data.example_1: atthi kho, brahme, subhakiṇho nāma kāyo, vehapphalo nāma kāyo, abhibhū nāma kāyo, taṃ tvaṃ na jānāsi na passasi, tam'ahaṃ jānāmi passāmi.

tathāgatassa h'etaṃ, vāseṭṭha, adhivacanaṃ dhammakāyo iti'pi, brahmakāyo iti'pi, dhammabhūto iti'pi, brahmabhūto iti'pi.

katamañ'c'āvuso, maraṇaṃ? yā tesaṃ tesaṃ sattānaṃ tamhā tamhā sattanikāyā cuti cavanatā bhedo antaradhānaṃ maccu maraṇaṃ kālaṃkiriyā khandhānaṃ bhedo kaḷevarassa nikkhepo jīvit'indriyass'upacchedo, idaṃ vuccat'āvuso, maraṇaṃ.

data.meaning_1: after; beyond; on the other side (of)
data.example_1: bhagavā pana, bhante, arahaṃ sammāsambuddho pahoti tathā kātuṃ yathā sabbo loko kāyassa bhedā paraṃ maraṇā sugatiṃ saggaṃ lokaṃ upapajjeyyā'ti?
data.example_2: evam'eva kho, poṭṭhapāda, ye te samaṇabrāhmaṇā evaṃvādino evaṃdiṭṭhino, ek'antasukhī attā hoti arogo paraṃ maraṇā'ti.

data.example_1: evañ'hi, bhikkhave, tassa purisassa hoti, imaṃ c'āhaṃ aṅgārakāsuṃ papatissāmi, tatonidānaṃ maraṇaṃ vā nigacchāmi maraṇamattaṃ vā dukkhan'ti
data.example_2:
maraṇena'pi taṃ pahīyati,
yaṃ puriso mam'idan'ti maññati,
etam'pi viditvā paṇḍito,
na mamattāya nametha māmako.

data.meaning_1: state of loss; state of misery
data.example_1: puna caparaṃ, bhikkhave, sapatto sapattassa evaṃ icchati, aho vat'āyaṃ kāyassa bhedā paraṃ maraṇā apāyaṃ duggatiṃ vinipātaṃ nirayaṃ upapajjeyyā'ti! taṃ kissa hetu?
data.example_2: ayaṃ varāko kiñ'c'āpi idāni sukhito susajjito bhoge paribhuñjati, atha kho tīsu dvāresu ekenā'pi katassa kalyāṇakammassa abhāvā idāni apāyesu anappakaṃ dukkhaṃ domanassaṃ paṭisaṃvedissatī'ti.

data.meaning_combo: departure (from); separation (from); loss (of); lit. going away
data.example_1:
tasmā piyaṃ na kayirātha,
piya-apāyo hi pāpako,
ganthā tesaṃ na vijjanti,
yesaṃ n'atthi piy'āppiyaṃ

idha, bhikkhave, khettaṃ unnāmaninnāmi ca hoti, pāsāṇasakkharikañ'ca hoti, ūsarañ'ca hoti, na ca gambhīrasitaṃ hoti, na āyasampannaṃ hoti, na apāyasampannaṃ hoti, na mātikāsampannaṃ hoti, na mariyādasampannaṃ hoti.

data.meaning_combo: decline; deterioration; downfall; ruin; lit. going away
data.example_1:
añña'd'atthuharo mitto,
yo ca mitto vacīparo,
anuppiyañ'ca yo āha,
apāyesu ca yo sakhā.
atha kho bhagavā pānīyaṃ apāyi.
tasmiṃ kho pana, bhikkhave, saṅgāme asurā jiniṃsu, devā parājiniṃsu. parājitā ca kho, bhikkhave, devā apāyaṃsv'eva uttarenamukhā, abhiyaṃsv'eva ne asurā.

data.meaning_1: state of misery; bad destination; hell
data.example_1: taṃ kissa hetu? aparisuddhattā, bhikkhave, vatthassa. evam'eva kho, bhikkhave, citte saṃkiliṭṭhe, duggati pāṭikaṅkhā.
data.example_2:
ayasā'va malaṃ samuṭṭhitaṃ,
tat'uṭṭhāya tam'eva khādati,
evaṃ atidhonacārinaṃ,
sakakammāni nayanti duggatiṃ.

data.meaning_1: state of suffering; lower realm; underworld
data.example_1: m'āyaṃ āyasmā kāyassa bhedā paraṃ maraṇā apāyaṃ duggatiṃ vinipātaṃ nirayaṃ upapajjī'ti! evaṃ tasmiṃ puggale āghāto paṭivinetabbo.
data.example_2: puna caparaṃ, bhikkhave, sapatto sapattassa evaṃ icchati, aho vat'āyaṃ kāyassa bhedā paraṃ maraṇā apāyaṃ duggatiṃ vinipātaṃ nirayaṃ upapajjeyyā'ti! taṃ kissa hetu?

data.example_1:
yāya devā manussā ca,
sitā tiṭṭhanti atthikā,
tarath'etaṃ visattikaṃ,
khaṇo vo mā upaccagā,

components.example_1: idha, bhikkhave, bhikkhu na rūpaññū hoti, na lakkhaṇakusalo hoti, na āsāṭikaṃ hāretā hoti, na vaṇaṃ paṭicchādetā hoti, na dhūmaṃ kattā hoti, na titthaṃ jānāti, na pītaṃ jānāti, na vīthiṃ jānāti, na gocarakusalo hoti
evam'evaṃ kho, bhikkhave, idh'ekacco bhikkhu bhikkhusaṅghaṃ piṭṭhito piṭṭhito anubandho hoti, aham'pi bhikkhu, aham'pi bhikkhū'ti.
components.example_2: idha, bhikkhave, ekaccassa puggalassa appamattakam'pi pāpakammaṃ kataṃ tam'enaṃ nirayaṃ upaneti.

components.example_1: katamā ca, sāriputta, opapātikā yoni? devā, nerayikā, ekacce ca manussā, ekacce ca vinipātikā, ayaṃ vuccati, sāriputta, opapātikā yoni.
components.example_2: ye'me, bho gotama, samaṇabrāhmaṇā saṅghino gaṇino gaṇ'ācariyā ñātā yasassino titthakarā sādhusammatā, bahujanassa… sabb'ete sakāya paṭiññāya abbhaññaṃsu sabb'eva n'ābbhaññaṃsu, udāhu ekacce abbhaññaṃsu ekacce n'ābbhaññaṃsū'ti?

components.meaning_1: here; in this regard; in this case
components.meaning_combo: here; in this regard; in this case
components.example_1: idha, bhikkhave, bhikkhu kāye kāy'ānupassī viharati
components.example_2: idha, bhikkhave, ekacco puggalo nīce kule paccājāto hoti, caṇḍālakule vā venakule vā nesādakule vā rathakārakule vā pukkusakule vā dalidde app'annapānabhojane kasiravuttike, yattha kasirena ghāsacchādo labbhati.

data.example_1:
anicce niccasaññino,
dukkhe ca sukhasaññino,
anattani ca attā'ti,
asubhe subhasaññino,
micchādiṭṭhihatā sattā,
khittacittā visaññino.
data.example_2: evam'eva kho, bhikkhave, appakā te sattā ye manussesu paccājāyanti. atha kho ete'y'eva bahutarā sattā ye aññatra manussehi paccājāyanti.

data.example_1:
hitvā icchañ'ca lobhañ'ca,
yattha satto puthujjano,
cakkhumā paṭipajjeyya,
tareyya narakaṃ imaṃ.
data.example_2:
satto guhāyaṃ bahun'ābhichanno,
tiṭṭhaṃ naro mohanasmiṃ pagāḷho,
dūre vivekā hi tathāvidho so,
kāmā hi loke na hi suppahāyā.

data.example_1:
akkhambhiyo hoti agāram'āvasaṃ,
par'ābhibhū sattubhi nappamaddano,
manussabhūten'idha hoti kenaci,
akkhambhiyo tassa phalena kammuno.
data.example_2:
idaṃ kho'haṃ tadāvocaṃ,
gahitā tena sattunā,
na me idaṃ tathā dukkhaṃ,
yaṃ maṃ khādeyya rakkhaso,
yañ'ca me ayyaputtassa,
mano hessati aññathā.

data.meaning_combo: body; physical body; physical process; lit. accumulation
data.example_1: yāv'assa kāyo ṭhassati tāva naṃ dakkhanti devamanussā kāyassa bhedā uddhaṃ jīvitapariyādānā na naṃ dakkhanti devamanussā'ti
data.example_2: tassa sabbehi imehi pāpakehi akusalehi dhammehi visuddham'attānaṃ samanupassato, vimuttam'attānaṃ samanupassato, pāmojjaṃ jāyati, pamuditassa pīti jāyati, pītimanassa kāyo passambhati, passaddhakāyo sukhaṃ vedeti, sukhino cittaṃ samādhiyati.

data.example_1: yāv'assa kāyo ṭhassati tāva naṃ dakkhanti devamanussā kāyassa bhedā uddhaṃ jīvitapariyādānā na naṃ dakkhanti devamanussā'ti
data.example_2: tassa sabbehi imehi pāpakehi akusalehi dhammehi visuddham'attānaṃ samanupassato, vimuttam'attānaṃ samanupassato, pāmojjaṃ jāyati, pamuditassa pīti jāyati, pītimanassa kāyo passambhati, passaddhakāyo sukhaṃ vedeti, sukhino cittaṃ samādhiyati.

data.meaning_1: group; host; company; collection; multitude; mass
data.meaning_combo: group; host; company; collection; multitude; mass; lit. accumulation
data.example_1: tena sudaṃ, bhante, devatā tāvatiṃsā attamanā honti pamuditā pītisomanassajātā dibbā vata bho kāyā paripūrenti, hāyanti asurakāyā'ti
data.example_2:
mahāsamayo pavanasmiṃ,
devakāyā samāgatā,
āgat'amha imaṃ dhammasamayaṃ,
dakkhitāye aparājitasaṅghan'ti.

data.grammar: ind, prep, acc sg of para
data.meaning_1: after; beyond; on the other side (of)
data.example_1: bhagavā pana, bhante, arahaṃ sammāsambuddho pahoti tathā kātuṃ yathā sabbo loko kāyassa bhedā paraṃ maraṇā sugatiṃ saggaṃ lokaṃ upapajjeyyā'ti?
data.example_2: evam'eva kho, poṭṭhapāda, ye te samaṇabrāhmaṇā evaṃvādino evaṃdiṭṭhino, ek'antasukhī attā hoti arogo paraṃ maraṇā'ti.

data.example_1: evañ'hi, bhikkhave, tassa purisassa hoti, imaṃ c'āhaṃ aṅgārakāsuṃ papatissāmi, tatonidānaṃ maraṇaṃ vā nigacchāmi maraṇamattaṃ vā dukkhan'ti
data.example_2:
maraṇena'pi taṃ pahīyati,
yaṃ puriso mam'idan'ti maññati,
etam'pi viditvā paṇḍito,
na mamattāya nametha māmako.

data.meaning_1: good destination; happy fate; state of happiness
data.example_1: taṃ kissa hetu? parisuddhattā, bhikkhave, vatthassa. evam'eva kho, bhikkhave, citte asaṃkiliṭṭhe, sugati pāṭikaṅkhā.
data.example_2: bhagavā pana, bhante, arahaṃ sammāsambuddho pahoti tathā kātuṃ yathā sabbo loko kāyassa bhedā paraṃ maraṇā sugatiṃ saggaṃ lokaṃ upapajjeyyā'ti?

data.meaning_combo: righteous; good; just; fortunate; lit. who goes well
data.example_1:
gabbham'eke uppajjanti,
nirayaṃ pāpakammino,
saggaṃ sugatino yanti,
parinibbanti anāsavā.

data.example_1:
āyuṃ arogiyaṃ vaṇṇaṃ,
saggaṃ uccākulīnataṃ,
ratiyo patthayantena,
uḷārā apar'āparā.
data.example_2: brāhmaṇā, bhante, pacchā bhūmakā kāmaṇḍalukā sevālamālikā udak'orohakā aggiparicārakā. te mataṃ kālaṅ'kataṃ uyyāpenti nāma saññāpenti nāma saggaṃ nāma okkāmenti.

data.example_1:
gamanena na pattabbo,
lokass'anto kudācanaṃ,
na ca appatvā lok'antaṃ,
dukkhā atthi pamocanaṃ.
data.example_2: iti uddham'adho tiriyaṃ sabbadhi sabb'attatāya sabbāvantaṃ lokaṃ mettāsahagatena cetasā vipulena mahaggatena appamāṇena averena abyābajjhena pharitvā viharati.

data.example_1:
ayaṃ loko paro loko,
brahmaloko sadevako,
diṭṭhiṃ te n'ābhijānāti,
gotamassa yasassino.
data.example_2:
pāpāni parivajjeti,
sa munī tena so muni,
yo munāti ubho loke,
muni tena pavuccati.

data.example_1: dve'me, bhikkhave, dhammā sukkā lokaṃ pālenti. katame dve? hirī ca ottappañ'ca.
data.example_2:
kenassu nivuto loko,
kenassu nappakāsati,
kiss'ābhilepanaṃ brūsi,
kiṃsu tassa mahabbhayaṃ.

data.meaning_1: world of experience; (comm) world of aggregates, sense spheres and elements
data.meaning_combo: world of experience; (comm) world of aggregates, sense spheres and elements
data.example_1: puna caparaṃ, bhikkhave, tathāgato anekadhātuṃ nānādhātuṃ lokaṃ yathābhūtaṃ pajānāti.

components.meaning_combo: being reborn; re-arising (in); lit. going towards
components.example_1: idh'āhaṃ, bhante, mātugāmaṃ passāmi dibbena cakkhunā visuddhena atikkantamānusakena kāyassa bhedā paraṃ maraṇā apāyaṃ duggatiṃ vinipātaṃ nirayaṃ upapajjantaṃ.

components.meaning_1: thus; like this; this is; and so
components.example_1: iti kho, bhikkhave, na'y'idaṃ brahmacariyaṃ lābhasakkārasilok'ānisaṃsaṃ na sīlasampad'ānisaṃsaṃ na samādhisampad'ānisaṃsaṃ na ñāṇadassan'ānisaṃsaṃ
components.example_2:
akiñcanaṃ anādānaṃ,
etaṃ dīpaṃ anāparaṃ,
nibbānaṃ iti naṃ brūmi,
jarāmaccuparikkhayaṃ.

data.meaning_combo: is reborn; re-arises (in); lit. goes towards

components.example_1:
atha v'āssa agārāni,
aggi ḍahati pāvako,
kāyassa bhedā duppañño,
nirayaṃ so-upapajjati.
components.example_2: yattha nu kho, bhante, na jāyati na jīyati na mīyati na cavati na upapajjati, sakkā nu kho so, bhante, gamanena lokassa anto ñātuṃ vā daṭṭhuṃ vā pāpuṇituṃ vā'ti?

components.example_1:
chinda sotaṃ parakkamma,
kāme panuda brāhmaṇa,
nappahāya munī kāme,
n'ekattam'upapajjati.

components.meaning_1: is suitable; is acceptable; is admissible
components.meaning_combo: is suitable; is acceptable; is admissible; lit. goes towards
components.example_1: cakkhu attā'ti yo vadeyya taṃ na upapajjati. cakkhussa uppādo'pi vayo'pi paññāyati.

components.meaning_1: thus; like this; this is; and so
